\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# 1. Prepare the hyperparameter summary data}
\NormalTok{pop\_summary }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit\_ml\_wba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mu[1]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"mu[2]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sigma[1]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sigma[2]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Omega[1,2]"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{true\_value =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(pop\_logit\_rho\_mean, pop\_log\_kappa\_mean,}
\NormalTok{                   pop\_logit\_rho\_sd, pop\_log\_kappa\_sd, pop\_correlation),}
    \CommentTok{\# Clean labels for the plot}
    \AttributeTok{clean\_var =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Mean: logit(ρ)"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Mean: log(κ)"}\NormalTok{, }
                  \StringTok{"SD: logit(ρ)"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"SD: log(κ)"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Correlation: Ω"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# Extract point estimates for the distributions}
\NormalTok{pop\_est }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pop\_summary }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(variable, mean) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{deframe}\NormalTok{()}

\CommentTok{\# 2. Transform unpooled MAP estimates to the unconstrained population scale}
\NormalTok{unpooled\_pop }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ unpooled\_ests }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{logit\_rho =} \FunctionTok{qlogis}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{pmin}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{pmax}\NormalTok{(unpooled\_rho, }\FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{), }\FloatTok{0.999}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{log\_kappa =} \FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{pmax}\NormalTok{(unpooled\_kappa, }\FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{)) }\CommentTok{\# safeguard against exactly 0}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# 3. Calculate summary statistics of the unpooled estimates}
\NormalTok{unpooled\_rho\_mean }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(unpooled\_pop}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{logit\_rho)}
\NormalTok{unpooled\_rho\_sd   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sd}\NormalTok{(unpooled\_pop}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{logit\_rho)}
\NormalTok{unpooled\_kappa\_mean }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(unpooled\_pop}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{log\_kappa)}
\NormalTok{unpooled\_kappa\_sd   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sd}\NormalTok{(unpooled\_pop}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{log\_kappa)}
\NormalTok{unpooled\_cor      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{cor}\NormalTok{(unpooled\_pop}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{logit\_rho, unpooled\_pop}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{log\_kappa)}

\CommentTok{\# Create a dataframe of these unpooled sample statistics}
\NormalTok{unpooled\_hyper }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{clean\_var =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Mean: logit(ρ)"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Mean: log(κ)"}\NormalTok{, }
                \StringTok{"SD: logit(ρ)"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"SD: log(κ)"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Correlation: Ω"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{unpooled\_stat =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(unpooled\_rho\_mean, unpooled\_kappa\_mean, }
\NormalTok{                    unpooled\_rho\_sd, unpooled\_kappa\_sd, unpooled\_cor)}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Join with pop\_summary for the forest plot}
\NormalTok{plot\_hyper\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pop\_summary }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(unpooled\_hyper, }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"clean\_var"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{clean\_var =} \FunctionTok{fct\_rev}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(clean\_var, }\AttributeTok{levels =}\NormalTok{ clean\_var)))}

\CommentTok{\# 4. Create grid points for ALL theoretical Normal distributions}
\NormalTok{x\_rho   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{length.out =} \DecValTok{200}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{x\_kappa }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{length.out =} \DecValTok{200}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{dist\_rho }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ x\_rho,}
  \AttributeTok{True =} \FunctionTok{dnorm}\NormalTok{(x, pop\_logit\_rho\_mean, pop\_logit\_rho\_sd),}
  \AttributeTok{Hierarchical =} \FunctionTok{dnorm}\NormalTok{(x, pop\_est[}\StringTok{"mu[1]"}\NormalTok{], pop\_est[}\StringTok{"sigma[1]"}\NormalTok{]),}
  \AttributeTok{Unpooled =} \FunctionTok{dnorm}\NormalTok{(x, unpooled\_rho\_mean, unpooled\_rho\_sd)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{x, }\AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"Distribution"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"density"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{dist\_kappa }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ x\_kappa,}
  \AttributeTok{True =} \FunctionTok{dnorm}\NormalTok{(x, pop\_log\_kappa\_mean, pop\_log\_kappa\_sd),}
  \AttributeTok{Hierarchical =} \FunctionTok{dnorm}\NormalTok{(x, pop\_est[}\StringTok{"mu[2]"}\NormalTok{], pop\_est[}\StringTok{"sigma[2]"}\NormalTok{]),}
  \AttributeTok{Unpooled =} \FunctionTok{dnorm}\NormalTok{(x, unpooled\_kappa\_mean, unpooled\_kappa\_sd)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{x, }\AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"Distribution"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"density"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# 5. Build the plots}
\NormalTok{p\_pop\_rho }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_area}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =} \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(dist\_rho, Distribution }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"Unpooled"}\NormalTok{), }
            \FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ x, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ density, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"Unpooled Estimates"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.3}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =} \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(dist\_rho, Distribution }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \StringTok{"Unpooled"}\NormalTok{), }
            \FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ x, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ density, }\AttributeTok{color =}\NormalTok{ Distribution, }\AttributeTok{linetype =}\NormalTok{ Distribution), }
            \AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{1.2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"True"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"black"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Hierarchical"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#4575b4"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_linetype\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"True"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Hierarchical"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"solid"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Unpooled Estimates"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"grey60"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Population Distribution: logit(ρ)"}\NormalTok{, }
       \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Notice how the unpooled estimates are artificially too wide."}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"logit(ρ)"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Density"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"bottom"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{p\_pop\_kappa }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_area}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =} \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(dist\_kappa, Distribution }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"Unpooled"}\NormalTok{), }
            \FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ x, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ density, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"Unpooled Estimates"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.3}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =} \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(dist\_kappa, Distribution }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \StringTok{"Unpooled"}\NormalTok{), }
            \FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ x, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ density, }\AttributeTok{color =}\NormalTok{ Distribution, }\AttributeTok{linetype =}\NormalTok{ Distribution), }
            \AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{1.2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"True"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"black"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Hierarchical"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#d73027"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_linetype\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"True"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Hierarchical"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"solid"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Unpooled Estimates"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"grey60"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Population Distribution: log(κ)"}\NormalTok{, }
       \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"The hierarchical model recovers the true, tighter variance."}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"log(κ)"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Density"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"bottom"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Forest plot for exact hyperparameter recovery}
\NormalTok{p\_hyper }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(plot\_hyper\_data, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ clean\_var)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \CommentTok{\# Hierarchical Posterior (Line and Dot)}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_pointrange}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ mean, }\AttributeTok{xmin =}\NormalTok{ q5, }\AttributeTok{xmax =}\NormalTok{ q95, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"Hierarchical"}\NormalTok{), }
                  \AttributeTok{size =} \FloatTok{0.8}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \CommentTok{\# Unpooled Sample Statistic (Diamond)}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ unpooled\_stat, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"Unpooled"}\NormalTok{), }
             \AttributeTok{shape =} \DecValTok{18}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \CommentTok{\# True Generating Value (Red Cross)}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ true\_value, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"True"}\NormalTok{), }
             \AttributeTok{shape =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{stroke =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Hierarchical"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"midnightblue"}\NormalTok{, }
                                \StringTok{"Unpooled"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"grey60"}\NormalTok{, }
                                \StringTok{"True"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"red"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Hyperparameter Recovery \& Partial Pooling"}\NormalTok{, }
       \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Comparing Hierarchical Posteriors (Mean ± 90\% CI), Unpooled Sample Stats, and True Values"}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Parameter Value"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"bottom"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# 6. Combine with patchwork}
\NormalTok{(p\_pop\_rho }\SpecialCharTok{|}\NormalTok{ p\_pop\_kappa) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ p\_hyper }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{plot\_layout}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{heights =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{plot\_annotation}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Population{-}Level Recovery and Variance Shrinkage"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{theme =} \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{plot.title =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{16}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{face =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{10-BayesianModels_files/figure-pdf/ch10_pop_recovery_summary-1.pdf}
\end{center}

Variance Shrinkage: The top image demonstrates that the hierarchical
model accurately recovers the true, tighter variance of the population
distributions. In contrast, the unpooled sample statistics are
artificially wide, overestimating the true variance.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# 1. unpooled\_ests was computed in the previous chunk}

\CommentTok{\# 2. Extract MULTILEVEL (partially pooled) posterior means and join}
\NormalTok{recovery\_ml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ agent\_params\_ml }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{est\_rho   =} \FunctionTok{map\_dbl}\NormalTok{(agent\_id, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(draws\_ml[[}\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"rho["}\NormalTok{, .x, }\StringTok{"]"}\NormalTok{)]])),}
    \AttributeTok{est\_kappa =} \FunctionTok{map\_dbl}\NormalTok{(agent\_id, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(draws\_ml[[}\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"kappa["}\NormalTok{, .x, }\StringTok{"]"}\NormalTok{)]])),}
    \AttributeTok{est\_wd    =} \FunctionTok{map\_dbl}\NormalTok{(agent\_id, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(draws\_ml[[}\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"weight\_direct["}\NormalTok{, .x, }\StringTok{"]"}\NormalTok{)]])),}
    \AttributeTok{est\_ws    =} \FunctionTok{map\_dbl}\NormalTok{(agent\_id, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(draws\_ml[[}\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"weight\_social["}\NormalTok{, .x, }\StringTok{"]"}\NormalTok{)]]))}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(unpooled\_ests, }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"agent\_id"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# 3. Calculate population means (the "center of gravity")}
\NormalTok{pop\_rho\_true   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plogis}\NormalTok{(pop\_logit\_rho\_mean)}
\NormalTok{pop\_kappa\_true }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(pop\_log\_kappa\_mean)}
\NormalTok{pop\_wd\_true    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pop\_rho\_true }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ pop\_kappa\_true}
\NormalTok{pop\_ws\_true    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ pop\_rho\_true) }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ pop\_kappa\_true}

\CommentTok{\# 4. Determine a common maximum scale for wd and ws plots}
\NormalTok{max\_w }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(recovery\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{weight\_direct, recovery\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{est\_wd, recovery\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{unpooled\_wd,}
\NormalTok{               recovery\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{weight\_social, recovery\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{est\_ws, recovery\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{unpooled\_ws)) }\SpecialCharTok{*} \FloatTok{1.05}

\CommentTok{\# 5. Build plots: Arrow from Unpooled (hollow) to Pooled (solid)}
\NormalTok{p\_rho }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(recovery\_ml, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ rho)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_hline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{yintercept =}\NormalTok{ pop\_rho\_true, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dotted"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"black"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_abline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_segment}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xend =}\NormalTok{ rho, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ unpooled\_rho, }\AttributeTok{yend =}\NormalTok{ est\_rho), }
               \AttributeTok{arrow =} \FunctionTok{arrow}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{length =} \FunctionTok{unit}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"cm"}\NormalTok{)), }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ unpooled\_rho), }\AttributeTok{shape =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey40"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ est\_rho), }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.9}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"\#4575b4"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{coord\_cartesian}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xlim =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{ylim =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Recovery: ρ (relative allocation)"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"True ρ"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Estimated ρ"}\NormalTok{) }

\NormalTok{p\_kappa }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(recovery\_ml, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ kappa)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_hline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{yintercept =}\NormalTok{ pop\_kappa\_true, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dotted"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"black"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_abline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_segment}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xend =}\NormalTok{ kappa, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ unpooled\_kappa, }\AttributeTok{yend =}\NormalTok{ est\_kappa), }
               \AttributeTok{arrow =} \FunctionTok{arrow}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{length =} \FunctionTok{unit}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"cm"}\NormalTok{)), }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ unpooled\_kappa), }\AttributeTok{shape =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey40"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ est\_kappa), }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.9}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"\#d73027"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Recovery: κ (total evidence scaling)"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"True κ"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Estimated κ"}\NormalTok{) }

\NormalTok{p\_wd }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(recovery\_ml, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ weight\_direct)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_hline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{yintercept =}\NormalTok{ pop\_wd\_true, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dotted"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"black"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_abline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_segment}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xend =}\NormalTok{ weight\_direct, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ unpooled\_wd, }\AttributeTok{yend =}\NormalTok{ est\_wd), }
               \AttributeTok{arrow =} \FunctionTok{arrow}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{length =} \FunctionTok{unit}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"cm"}\NormalTok{)), }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ unpooled\_wd), }\AttributeTok{shape =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey40"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ est\_wd), }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.9}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"\#4daf4a"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{coord\_cartesian}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xlim =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, max\_w), }\AttributeTok{ylim =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, max\_w)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Recovery: w\_d (derived)"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"True w\_d"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Estimated w\_d"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{p\_ws }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(recovery\_ml, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ weight\_social)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_hline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{yintercept =}\NormalTok{ pop\_ws\_true, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dotted"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"black"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_abline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_segment}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xend =}\NormalTok{ weight\_social, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ unpooled\_ws, }\AttributeTok{yend =}\NormalTok{ est\_ws), }
               \AttributeTok{arrow =} \FunctionTok{arrow}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{length =} \FunctionTok{unit}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"cm"}\NormalTok{)), }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ unpooled\_ws), }\AttributeTok{shape =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey40"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ est\_ws), }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.9}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"\#984ea3"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{coord\_cartesian}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xlim =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, max\_w), }\AttributeTok{ylim =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, max\_w)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Recovery: w\_s (derived)"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"True w\_s"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Estimated w\_s"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{(p\_rho }\SpecialCharTok{|}\NormalTok{ p\_kappa) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (p\_wd }\SpecialCharTok{|}\NormalTok{ p\_ws) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{plot\_annotation}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"Multilevel WBA Parameter Recovery \& Shrinkage"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Arrows trace shrinkage from Unpooled MAP estimates (hollow) to Multilevel Posterior Means (solid).}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{Notice how pooling pulls extreme estimates toward the population mean (dotted horizontal lines)."}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{10-BayesianModels_files/figure-pdf/ch10_multilevel_recovery-1.pdf}
\end{center}

Look for three features. First, \(\rho\) recovery should be tight ---
this parameter is well-identified from conflict trials, just as in the
single-agent case. Second, \(\kappa\) recovery will be noisier --- the
total evidence scale is harder to pin down from binary outcomes. Third,
agents at the extremes should be \emph{pulled toward the centre}
relative to their true values. This is partial pooling in action: the
hierarchical prior regularises extreme estimates. The strength of this
shrinkage depends on how informative each agent's data are relative to
the population distribution.

\section{Simulation-Based Calibration Checks (SBC): Multilevel
Models}\label{simulation-based-calibration-checks-sbc-multilevel-models}

SBC is \emph{more} critical for multilevel models than for single-agent
models. The hierarchical posterior geometry --- with its potential
funnels, correlations, and partial-pooling dynamics --- creates subtle
failure modes that standard MCMC diagnostics may miss. We run SBC for
both the ML-WBA and ML-PBA.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{n\_sbc\_ml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{200}  \CommentTok{\# Reduced from single{-}agent count due to computational cost}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simmodels/ch10\_sbc\_ml\_wba.rds"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"simmodels/ch10\_sbc\_ml\_pba.rds"}\NormalTok{)))) \{}
  
  \CommentTok{\# ── ML{-}WBA SBC Generator ──────────────────────────────────────────}
\NormalTok{  sbc\_gen\_ml\_wba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{SBC\_generator\_function}\NormalTok{(}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(n\_agents\_sbc, ev, n\_reps) \{}
\NormalTok{      J }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ n\_agents\_sbc}
      
      \CommentTok{\# Draw population parameters from priors}
\NormalTok{      mu\_1     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{)       }\CommentTok{\# logit\_rho mean}
\NormalTok{      mu\_2     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{)   }\CommentTok{\# log\_kappa mean}
\NormalTok{      sigma\_1  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rexp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      sigma\_2  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rexp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)}
      
      \CommentTok{\# LKJ(2) correlation: draw from marginal Beta, rescale}
\NormalTok{      r\_raw    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rbeta}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      Omega\_12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{2} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ r\_raw }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \DecValTok{1}
      
      \CommentTok{\# Construct Cholesky of correlation matrix}
\NormalTok{      L11 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{; L21 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ Omega\_12; L22 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sqrt}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ Omega\_12}\SpecialCharTok{\^{}}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)}
      
      \CommentTok{\# Draw individual parameters (NCP)}
\NormalTok{      z }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{matrix}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ J), }\AttributeTok{nrow =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      theta\_raw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{diag}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(sigma\_1, sigma\_2)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%} \FunctionTok{rbind}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{        L11 }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ z[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,],}
\NormalTok{        L21 }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ z[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,] }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ L22 }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ z[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,]}
\NormalTok{      )}
      
\NormalTok{      rho\_j   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plogis}\NormalTok{(mu\_1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ theta\_raw[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,])}
\NormalTok{      kappa\_j }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(mu\_2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ theta\_raw[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,])}
\NormalTok{      wd\_j    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ rho\_j }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ kappa\_j}
\NormalTok{      ws\_j    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ rho\_j) }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ kappa\_j}
      
      \CommentTok{\# Generate trial data for each agent}
\NormalTok{      all\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(J), }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(j) \{}
\NormalTok{        agent\_ev }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ev }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{slice}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{n}\NormalTok{()), }\AttributeTok{times =}\NormalTok{ n\_reps))}
\NormalTok{        N\_j }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(agent\_ev)}
        
\NormalTok{        alpha\_p }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.5} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ wd\_j[j] }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ ws\_j[j] }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue2}
\NormalTok{        beta\_p  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.5} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ wd\_j[j] }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ (agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{total1 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue1) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{                         ws\_j[j] }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ (agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{total2 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue2)}
\NormalTok{        p\_blue  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rbeta}\NormalTok{(N\_j, alpha\_p, beta\_p)}
        
\NormalTok{        agent\_ev }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{agent\_id =}\NormalTok{ j,}
          \AttributeTok{choice   =} \FunctionTok{rbinom}\NormalTok{(N\_j, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, p\_blue)}
\NormalTok{        )}
\NormalTok{      \})}
      
      \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
          \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{mu[1]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}      \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ mu\_1,}
          \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{mu[2]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}      \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ mu\_2,}
          \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{sigma[1]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}   \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ sigma\_1,}
          \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{sigma[2]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}   \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ sigma\_2,}
          \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Omega[1,2]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ Omega\_12}
\NormalTok{        ),}
        \AttributeTok{generated =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{N        =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(all\_data),}
          \AttributeTok{J        =}\NormalTok{ J,}
          \AttributeTok{agent\_id =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{agent\_id,}
          \AttributeTok{choice   =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{choice,}
          \AttributeTok{blue1    =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue1,}
          \AttributeTok{total1   =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{total1,}
          \AttributeTok{blue2    =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue2,}
          \AttributeTok{total2   =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{total2}
\NormalTok{        )}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    \},}
    \AttributeTok{n\_agents\_sbc =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{,  }\CommentTok{\# Fewer agents for SBC speed}
    \AttributeTok{ev           =}\NormalTok{ evidence\_combinations,}
    \AttributeTok{n\_reps       =} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{  )}
  
\NormalTok{  sbc\_datasets\_ml\_wba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_datasets}\NormalTok{(sbc\_gen\_ml\_wba, n\_sbc\_ml)}
  
\NormalTok{  sbc\_backend\_ml\_wba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ SBC}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{SBC\_backend\_cmdstan\_sample}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    mod\_ml\_wba,}
    \AttributeTok{chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{iter\_warmup =} \DecValTok{500}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{500}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{parallel\_chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adapt\_delta =} \FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{show\_messages =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
  
\NormalTok{  sbc\_results\_ml\_wba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_SBC}\NormalTok{(sbc\_datasets\_ml\_wba, sbc\_backend\_ml\_wba,}
                                     \AttributeTok{keep\_fits =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(sbc\_results\_ml\_wba, }\StringTok{"simmodels/ch10\_sbc\_ml\_wba.rds"}\NormalTok{)}

  \CommentTok{\# ── ML{-}PBA SBC Generator ──────────────────────────────────────────}
\NormalTok{  sbc\_gen\_ml\_pba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{SBC\_generator\_function}\NormalTok{(}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(n\_agents\_sbc, ev, n\_reps) \{}
\NormalTok{      J }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ n\_agents\_sbc}
      
\NormalTok{      mu\_logit\_p    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      sigma\_logit\_p }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rexp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      z\_p           }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(J)}
\NormalTok{      p\_j           }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plogis}\NormalTok{(mu\_logit\_p }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ sigma\_logit\_p }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ z\_p)}
      
\NormalTok{      all\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(J), }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(j) \{}
\NormalTok{        agent\_ev }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ev }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{slice}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{n}\NormalTok{()), }\AttributeTok{times =}\NormalTok{ n\_reps))}
\NormalTok{        N\_j }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(agent\_ev)}
        
\NormalTok{        alpha\_p }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.5} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ p\_j[j] }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ p\_j[j]) }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue2}
\NormalTok{        beta\_p  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.5} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ p\_j[j] }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ (agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{total1 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue1) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{                         (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ p\_j[j]) }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ (agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{total2 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ agent\_ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue2)}
\NormalTok{        p\_blue  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rbeta}\NormalTok{(N\_j, alpha\_p, beta\_p)}
        
\NormalTok{        agent\_ev }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{agent\_id =}\NormalTok{ j,}
          \AttributeTok{choice   =} \FunctionTok{rbinom}\NormalTok{(N\_j, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, p\_blue)}
\NormalTok{        )}
\NormalTok{      \})}
      
      \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{mu\_logit\_p    =}\NormalTok{ mu\_logit\_p,}
          \AttributeTok{sigma\_logit\_p =}\NormalTok{ sigma\_logit\_p}
\NormalTok{        ),}
        \AttributeTok{generated =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{N        =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(all\_data),}
          \AttributeTok{J        =}\NormalTok{ J,}
          \AttributeTok{agent\_id =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{agent\_id,}
          \AttributeTok{choice   =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{choice,}
          \AttributeTok{blue1    =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue1,}
          \AttributeTok{total1   =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{total1,}
          \AttributeTok{blue2    =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue2,}
          \AttributeTok{total2   =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{total2}
\NormalTok{        )}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    \},}
    \AttributeTok{n\_agents\_sbc =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{ev           =}\NormalTok{ evidence\_combinations,}
    \AttributeTok{n\_reps       =} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{  )}
  
\NormalTok{  sbc\_datasets\_ml\_pba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_datasets}\NormalTok{(sbc\_gen\_ml\_pba, n\_sbc\_ml)}
  
\NormalTok{  sbc\_backend\_ml\_pba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ SBC}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{SBC\_backend\_cmdstan\_sample}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    mod\_ml\_pba,}
    \AttributeTok{chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{iter\_warmup =} \DecValTok{500}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{500}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{parallel\_chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adapt\_delta =} \FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{show\_messages =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
  
\NormalTok{  sbc\_results\_ml\_pba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_SBC}\NormalTok{(sbc\_datasets\_ml\_pba, sbc\_backend\_ml\_pba,}
                                     \AttributeTok{keep\_fits =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(sbc\_results\_ml\_pba, }\StringTok{"simmodels/ch10\_sbc\_ml\_pba.rds"}\NormalTok{)}
  
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  sbc\_results\_ml\_wba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simmodels/ch10\_sbc\_ml\_wba.rds"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  sbc\_results\_ml\_pba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simmodels/ch10\_sbc\_ml\_pba.rds"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Plot SBC calibration}
\NormalTok{p\_sbc\_ml\_wba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ SBC}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{plot\_ecdf\_diff}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  sbc\_results\_ml\_wba,}
  \AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mu[1]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"mu[2]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sigma[1]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sigma[2]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Omega[1,2]"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"SBC Calibration: ML{-}WBA (population parameters)"}\NormalTok{,}
         \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"N = "}\NormalTok{, n\_sbc\_ml, }\StringTok{" simulations. Lines inside bands = calibrated."}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{p\_sbc\_ml\_pba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ SBC}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{plot\_ecdf\_diff}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  sbc\_results\_ml\_pba,}
  \AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mu\_logit\_p"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sigma\_logit\_p"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"SBC Calibration: ML{-}PBA (population parameters)"}\NormalTok{,}
         \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"N = "}\NormalTok{, n\_sbc\_ml, }\StringTok{" simulations."}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{p\_sbc\_ml\_wba }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ p\_sbc\_ml\_pba}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{10-BayesianModels_files/figure-pdf/ch10_ml_sbc-1.pdf}
\end{center}

If any parameter's ECDF difference line escapes the grey bands, the
posterior for that parameter is systematically miscalibrated. Common
failure modes for multilevel models: (1) \(\sigma\) dipping below the
band near 0, indicating the hierarchical prior's boundary repulsion is
too weak; (2) the correlation \(\Omega_{1,2}\) showing asymmetric
miscalibration, indicating the LKJ prior interacts poorly with the NCP
geometry. If SBC passes, we have a global certificate that the Stan
sampler is unbiased across the entire joint prior space.

\subsection{Global Parameter Recovery from
SBC}\label{global-parameter-recovery-from-sbc-1}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{ml\_wba\_sbc\_recovery }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sbc\_results\_ml\_wba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{stats }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(variable }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mu[1]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"mu[2]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sigma[1]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sigma[2]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Omega[1,2]"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{model =} \StringTok{"ML{-}WBA"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{ml\_pba\_sbc\_recovery }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sbc\_results\_ml\_pba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{stats }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(variable }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mu\_logit\_p"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sigma\_logit\_p"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{model =} \StringTok{"ML{-}PBA"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{sbc\_ml\_recovery\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(ml\_wba\_sbc\_recovery, ml\_pba\_sbc\_recovery)}

\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(sbc\_ml\_recovery\_df, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ simulated\_value, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ median)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_abline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{slope =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{intercept =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_errorbar}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin =}\NormalTok{ q5, }\AttributeTok{ymax =}\NormalTok{ q95), }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"\#4575b4"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(model }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ variable, }\AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{"free"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Global Parameter Recovery: Multilevel SBC"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Each point = one simulated population. Error bars = 90\% CI."}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"True (simulated) value"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Posterior median"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{strip.background =} \FunctionTok{element\_rect}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"gray95"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{10-BayesianModels_files/figure-pdf/ch10_ml_sbc_recovery-1.pdf}
\end{center}

\section{Multilevel Model Comparison: Three-Way
LOO}\label{multilevel-model-comparison-three-way-loo}

Following the procedure from the single-agent comparison, we compare all
three multilevel models via PSIS-LOO. Because the simulated population
has agents with varying weights, we expect the ML-WBA to outperform the
ML-SBA. Whether the ML-PBA or ML-WBA wins depends on whether the
population s \(\kappa\) variation provides sufficient predictive benefit
to offset the additional complexity.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{loo\_ml\_sba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{loo}\NormalTok{(fit\_ml\_sba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_lik"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{loo\_ml\_pba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{loo}\NormalTok{(fit\_ml\_pba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_lik"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{loo\_ml\_wba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{loo}\NormalTok{(fit\_ml\_wba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_lik"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{))}

\FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"=== Multilevel Model Comparison: ML{-}SBA vs. ML{-}PBA vs. ML{-}WBA ===}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
=== Multilevel Model Comparison: ML-SBA vs. ML-PBA vs. ML-WBA ===
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{ml\_comparison }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{loo\_compare}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ML{-}SBA"} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ loo\_ml\_sba, }\StringTok{"ML{-}PBA"} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ loo\_ml\_pba, }\StringTok{"ML{-}WBA"} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ loo\_ml\_wba)}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(ml\_comparison)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
       elpd_diff se_diff
ML-SBA  0.0       0.0   
ML-WBA -1.9       1.0   
ML-PBA -2.7       2.0   
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{ml\_weights }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{loo\_model\_weights}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ML{-}SBA"} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ loo\_ml\_sba, }\StringTok{"ML{-}PBA"} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ loo\_ml\_pba, }\StringTok{"ML{-}WBA"} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ loo\_ml\_wba),}
  \AttributeTok{method =} \StringTok{"stacking"}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{Bayesian stacking weights:}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}

Bayesian stacking weights:
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(ml\_weights)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
Method: stacking
------
       weight
ML-SBA 0.987 
ML-PBA 0.013 
ML-WBA 0.000 
\end{verbatim}

Because the simulated agents were drawn from a population with varying
\(\rho\) and \(\kappa\) (not all equal to 1), the ML-WBA should
outperform the ML-SBA. The ELPD difference quantifies the predictive
cost of assuming all agents are perfect Bayesians when they are not.
However, given we set the simulation to be close to the SBA (balanced
weighting), the ML-SBA ends up winning.

Note that this is \emph{trial-level LOO}: it measures generalisation to
new \emph{trials} from known agents. For the clinically relevant
question --- \emph{can we predict a new participant's behaviour from the
population distribution alone?} --- we would need agent-level K-fold
cross-validation, as discussed in Chapter 8.

\subsection{Visualising Pointwise ELPD
Differences}\label{visualising-pointwise-elpd-differences}

To understand \emph{where} the ML-WBA gains its advantage over the
ML-SBA, we plot pointwise ELPD differences as a function of evidence
conflict --- the same diagnostic technique from the single-agent
section.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{pw\_ml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{obs       =} \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(stan\_data\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{N),}
  \AttributeTok{agent\_id  =}\NormalTok{ stan\_data\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{agent\_id,}
  \AttributeTok{blue1     =}\NormalTok{ stan\_data\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue1,}
  \AttributeTok{blue2     =}\NormalTok{ stan\_data\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue2,}
  \AttributeTok{elpd\_wba  =}\NormalTok{ loo\_ml\_wba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pointwise[, }\StringTok{"elpd\_loo"}\NormalTok{],}
  \AttributeTok{elpd\_sba  =}\NormalTok{ loo\_ml\_sba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pointwise[, }\StringTok{"elpd\_loo"}\NormalTok{],}
  \AttributeTok{elpd\_pba  =}\NormalTok{ loo\_ml\_pba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pointwise[, }\StringTok{"elpd\_loo"}\NormalTok{],}
  \AttributeTok{elpd\_diff\_wba\_sba =}\NormalTok{ elpd\_wba }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ elpd\_sba,}
  \AttributeTok{elpd\_diff\_wba\_pba =}\NormalTok{ elpd\_wba }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ elpd\_pba}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    agent\_params\_ml }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(agent\_id, rho, kappa),}
    \AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"agent\_id"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{prop\_direct       =}\NormalTok{ blue1 }\SpecialCharTok{/} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{prop\_social       =}\NormalTok{ blue2 }\SpecialCharTok{/} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{evidence\_conflict =} \FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(prop\_direct }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ prop\_social),}
    \AttributeTok{rho\_group =} \FunctionTok{cut}\NormalTok{(rho, }\AttributeTok{breaks =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.35}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.65}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
                    \AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Social{-}leaning"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Balanced"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Direct{-}leaning"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# WBA vs SBA, coloured by agent type}
\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(pw\_ml, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ evidence\_conflict, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ elpd\_diff\_wba\_sba)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_hline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{yintercept =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"grey40"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{colour =}\NormalTok{ rho\_group), }\AttributeTok{size =} \FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.4}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_smooth}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{method =} \StringTok{"gam"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{formula =}\NormalTok{ y }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{s}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{bs =} \StringTok{"cs"}\NormalTok{),}
              \AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"midnightblue"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ rho\_group) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_colour\_manual}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Social{-}leaning"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#377eb8"}\NormalTok{,}
               \StringTok{"Balanced"}       \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#4daf4a"}\NormalTok{,}
               \StringTok{"Direct{-}leaning"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#e41a1c"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Pointwise ELPD: ML{-}WBA vs. ML{-}SBA"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Faceted by agent type. Advantage grows with evidence conflict for non{-}balanced agents."}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Evidence Conflict |prop\_direct − prop\_social|"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"ELPD Difference (ML{-}WBA − ML{-}SBA)"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{colour =} \StringTok{"Agent type"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"bottom"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{10-BayesianModels_files/figure-pdf/ch10_ml_pointwise_elpd-1.pdf}
\end{center}

\section{Model Recovery: Multilevel
Level}\label{model-recovery-multilevel-level}

Model recovery at the multilevel level asks: \emph{if data are generated
by a specific multilevel model, can our comparison pipeline correctly
identify it?} We test three scenarios, paralleling the single-agent
analysis.

\subsection{Specific Scenarios}\label{specific-scenarios}

Before the full simulation, we examine three instructive scenarios:

\begin{enumerate}
\def\labelenumi{\arabic{enumi}.}
\item
  \textbf{SBA-Mimic Population:} All agents have
  \(\rho = 0.5, \kappa = 2.0\) (i.e., \(w_d = w_s = 1\)) with zero
  individual variation. The population \emph{is} the SBA.
\item
  \textbf{PBA Population:} Agents vary in \(\rho\) (drawn from a
  population) but all have \(\kappa = 1.0\). The total evidence budget
  is fixed; only allocation varies.
\item
  \textbf{Full WBA Population:} Agents vary in both \(\rho\) and
  \(\kappa\). The full hierarchical model is needed.
\end{enumerate}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Helper: generate multilevel data from a parameter specification}
\NormalTok{generate\_ml\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(agent\_rhos, agent\_kappas, ev, }\AttributeTok{n\_reps =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  J }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(agent\_rhos)}
\NormalTok{  all\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(J), }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(j) \{}
\NormalTok{    wd }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ agent\_rhos[j] }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ agent\_kappas[j]}
\NormalTok{    ws }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ agent\_rhos[j]) }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ agent\_kappas[j]}
    \FunctionTok{generate\_agent\_decisions}\NormalTok{(wd, ws, ev, }\AttributeTok{n\_samples =}\NormalTok{ n\_reps) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
      \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{agent\_id =}\NormalTok{ j, }\AttributeTok{total1 =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{L, }\AttributeTok{total2 =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{L)}
\NormalTok{  \})}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{N =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(all\_data), }\AttributeTok{J =}\NormalTok{ J,}
    \AttributeTok{agent\_id   =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{agent\_id,}
    \AttributeTok{choice     =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{choice,}
    \AttributeTok{N\_total    =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(all\_data),}
    \AttributeTok{N\_subjects =}\NormalTok{ J,}
    \AttributeTok{subj\_id    =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{agent\_id,}
    \AttributeTok{y          =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{choice,}
    \AttributeTok{blue1      =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue1,}
    \AttributeTok{total1     =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{total1,}
    \AttributeTok{blue2      =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{blue2,}
    \AttributeTok{total2     =}\NormalTok{ all\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{total2}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{J\_scen }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{15}

\CommentTok{\# Scenario 1: SBA{-}Mimic (no individual variation)}
\NormalTok{scen1\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_ml\_data}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{agent\_rhos   =} \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{, J\_scen),}
  \AttributeTok{agent\_kappas =} \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.0}\NormalTok{, J\_scen),}
  \AttributeTok{ev =}\NormalTok{ evidence\_combinations}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Scenario 2: PBA Population (rho varies, kappa = 1)}
\NormalTok{scen2\_rhos }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plogis}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(J\_scen, }\FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{scen2\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_ml\_data}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{agent\_rhos   =}\NormalTok{ scen2\_rhos,}
  \AttributeTok{agent\_kappas =} \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1.0}\NormalTok{, J\_scen),}
  \AttributeTok{ev =}\NormalTok{ evidence\_combinations}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Scenario 3: Full WBA population (both vary)}
\NormalTok{scen3\_draws }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ MASS}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mvrnorm}\NormalTok{(J\_scen, }\AttributeTok{mu =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.3}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{)),}
                              \AttributeTok{Sigma =} \FunctionTok{matrix}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.2}\NormalTok{), }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{scen3\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_ml\_data}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{agent\_rhos   =} \FunctionTok{plogis}\NormalTok{(scen3\_draws[, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]),}
  \AttributeTok{agent\_kappas =} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(scen3\_draws[, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{]),}
  \AttributeTok{ev =}\NormalTok{ evidence\_combinations}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{fit\_ml\_scenario }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(stan\_data, label) \{}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{{-}{-}{-} Fitting scenario: \%s {-}{-}{-}}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{, label))}

\NormalTok{  sba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mod\_ml\_sba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{sample}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ stan\_data, }\AttributeTok{chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{iter\_warmup =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adapt\_delta =} \FloatTok{0.9}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{show\_messages =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  pba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mod\_ml\_pba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{sample}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ stan\_data, }\AttributeTok{chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{iter\_warmup =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adapt\_delta =} \FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{show\_messages =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  wba }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mod\_ml\_wba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{sample}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ stan\_data, }\AttributeTok{chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{iter\_warmup =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adapt\_delta =} \FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{show\_messages =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}

  \CommentTok{\# Return pre{-}computed LOO objects, not the raw fits}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{SBA =} \FunctionTok{loo}\NormalTok{(sba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_lik"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{PBA =} \FunctionTok{loo}\NormalTok{(pba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_lik"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{WBA =} \FunctionTok{loo}\NormalTok{(wba}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_lik"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simmodels/ch10\_ml\_scenario\_loos.rds"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
\NormalTok{  loos\_scen1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_ml\_scenario}\NormalTok{(scen1\_data, }\StringTok{"SBA{-}Mimic Population"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  loos\_scen2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_ml\_scenario}\NormalTok{(scen2\_data, }\StringTok{"PBA Population"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  loos\_scen3 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_ml\_scenario}\NormalTok{(scen3\_data, }\StringTok{"Full WBA Population"}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{s1 =}\NormalTok{ loos\_scen1, }\AttributeTok{s2 =}\NormalTok{ loos\_scen2, }\AttributeTok{s3 =}\NormalTok{ loos\_scen3),}
          \StringTok{"simmodels/ch10\_ml\_scenario\_loos.rds"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  loos\_all   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simmodels/ch10\_ml\_scenario\_loos.rds"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  loos\_scen1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ loos\_all}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{s1}
\NormalTok{  loos\_scen2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ loos\_all}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{s2}
\NormalTok{  loos\_scen3 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ loos\_all}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{s3}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{compute\_ml\_scenario }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(loos, scenario\_name) \{}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{=== \%s ===}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{, scenario\_name))}
\NormalTok{  comp }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{loo\_compare}\NormalTok{(loos)}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(comp)}

\NormalTok{  w }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{loo\_model\_weights}\NormalTok{(loos, }\AttributeTok{method =} \StringTok{"stacking"}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Stacking weights:}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(w, }\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{))}

  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{loos =}\NormalTok{ loos, }\AttributeTok{weights =}\NormalTok{ w, }\AttributeTok{comparison =}\NormalTok{ comp)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{res\_scen1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_ml\_scenario}\NormalTok{(loos\_scen1, }\StringTok{"Scenario 1: SBA{-}Mimic Population"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}
