\subsubsection{Posterior Predictive Check (single
subject)}\label{posterior-predictive-check-single-subject}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(fit\_gcm\_single)) \{}
\NormalTok{  prob\_draws }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit\_gcm\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"prob\_cat1"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  n\_draws    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(prob\_draws)}
\NormalTok{  n\_trials   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ncol}\NormalTok{(prob\_draws)}

  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2025}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  yrep\_post }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{matrix}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rbinom}\NormalTok{(n\_draws }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ n\_trials, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{as.vector}\NormalTok{(prob\_draws)),}
                      \AttributeTok{nrow =}\NormalTok{ n\_draws)}

\NormalTok{  obs\_acc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{cummean}\NormalTok{(agent\_to\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sim\_response }\SpecialCharTok{==}\NormalTok{ agent\_to\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback)}
\NormalTok{  rep\_acc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{t}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{apply}\NormalTok{(yrep\_post, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(yr) \{}
    \FunctionTok{cummean}\NormalTok{(yr }\SpecialCharTok{==}\NormalTok{ agent\_to\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback)}
\NormalTok{  \}))}

\NormalTok{  ppc\_summary }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{trial =} \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(n\_trials),}
    \AttributeTok{obs   =}\NormalTok{ obs\_acc,}
    \AttributeTok{q05   =} \FunctionTok{apply}\NormalTok{(rep\_acc, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, quantile, }\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{q25   =} \FunctionTok{apply}\NormalTok{(rep\_acc, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, quantile, }\FloatTok{0.25}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{q50   =} \FunctionTok{apply}\NormalTok{(rep\_acc, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, quantile, }\FloatTok{0.50}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{q75   =} \FunctionTok{apply}\NormalTok{(rep\_acc, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, quantile, }\FloatTok{0.75}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{q95   =} \FunctionTok{apply}\NormalTok{(rep\_acc, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, quantile, }\FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(ppc\_summary, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ trial)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_ribbon}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin =}\NormalTok{ q05, }\AttributeTok{ymax =}\NormalTok{ q95), }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"\#56B4E9"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.20}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_ribbon}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin =}\NormalTok{ q25, }\AttributeTok{ymax =}\NormalTok{ q75), }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"\#56B4E9"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.40}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ q50), }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"\#0072B2"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.8}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ obs), }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"\#D55E00"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_y\_continuous}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{limits =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"Posterior Predictive Check: Cumulative Accuracy"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Blue ribbons: 50\% and 90\% posterior predictive intervals}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{Orange line: observed cumulative accuracy"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Trial"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Cumulative Accuracy"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{11-CategorizationModelsExemplars_files/figure-pdf/ch12_ppc_single-1.pdf}
\end{center}

Note that we picked cumulative accuracy as target measure for the PPC
because it is a more holistic summary of the learning dynamics than
trial-level accuracy. The GCM's path-dependence means that trial-level
predictions are noisier and less informative about model fit. We could
have also picked other behaviors, such as the evolving distribution of
attention-weighted distances to exemplars, or specific contrast

\subsubsection{Prior--Posterior Update
Plot}\label{priorposterior-update-plot}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(fit\_gcm\_single)) \{}
\NormalTok{  draws\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as\_draws\_df}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    fit\_gcm\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"w[1]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"log\_c"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"c"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"bias"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  true\_w1    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ agent\_to\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{w1\_true[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  true\_log\_c }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ agent\_to\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{log\_c\_true[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  true\_c     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ agent\_to\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{c\_true[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  true\_bias  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ agent\_to\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{bias\_true[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}

  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2026}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  n\_prior }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{4000}
\NormalTok{  prior\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{w[1]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{runif}\NormalTok{(n\_prior),}
    \AttributeTok{log\_c  =} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n\_prior, LOG\_C\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_C\_PRIOR\_SD),}
    \AttributeTok{c      =} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(log\_c),}
    \AttributeTok{bias   =} \FunctionTok{rbeta}\NormalTok{(n\_prior, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  pp\_panel }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(prior\_x, post\_x, true\_val, label) \{}
    \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{x      =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(prior\_x, post\_x),}
      \AttributeTok{source =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Prior"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(prior\_x)),}
                 \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Posterior"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(post\_x)))}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
      \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ x, }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ source, }\AttributeTok{color =}\NormalTok{ source)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{geom\_density}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{geom\_vline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xintercept =}\NormalTok{ true\_val, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"red"}\NormalTok{,}
                 \AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.7}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{Prior =} \StringTok{"grey60"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{Posterior =} \StringTok{"\#0072B2"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{Prior =} \StringTok{"grey40"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{Posterior =} \StringTok{"\#0072B2"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =}\NormalTok{ label, }\AttributeTok{x =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Density"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"bottom"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  p1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{pp\_panel}\NormalTok{(prior\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{w[1]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, draws\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{w[1]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, true\_w1, }\StringTok{"w[1]"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  p2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{pp\_panel}\NormalTok{(prior\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{log\_c,  draws\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{log\_c,  true\_log\_c, }\StringTok{"log(c) — computational scale"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  p3 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{pp\_panel}\NormalTok{(prior\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{c,      draws\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{c,      true\_c,     }\StringTok{"c — natural scale"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  p4 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{pp\_panel}\NormalTok{(prior\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{bias,   draws\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{bias,   true\_bias,  }\StringTok{"bias"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  (p1 }\SpecialCharTok{|}\NormalTok{ p2) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (p3 }\SpecialCharTok{|}\NormalTok{ p4) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{plot\_annotation}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"Prior–Posterior Update for the Single{-}Subject GCM"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Red dashed line = true generating value"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{11-CategorizationModelsExemplars_files/figure-pdf/ch12_prior_posterior_single-1.pdf}
\end{center}

This looks surprisingly good! --- the posterior for \(w[1]\) is tightly
concentrated around the true value of 0.9, and the posterior for
\(\log c\) is also well-concentrated around the true \(\log(2)\). The
bias parameter is less informed, which makes sense given that it has a
more indirect influence on the choice probabilities.

\subsubsection{\texorpdfstring{Joint Posterior Geometry: \(c\) vs
\(w\)}{Joint Posterior Geometry: c vs w}}\label{joint-posterior-geometry-c-vs-w}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(fit\_gcm\_single)) \{}
\NormalTok{  bayesplot}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mcmc\_pairs}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    fit\_gcm\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_c"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"w[1]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"bias"}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{diag\_fun     =} \StringTok{"dens"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{off\_diag\_fun =} \StringTok{"hex"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{11-CategorizationModelsExemplars_files/figure-pdf/ch12_cw_identifiability_pairs-1.pdf}
\end{center}

The parameters look nicely uncorrelated.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{\texorpdfstring{LOO with Pareto-\(\hat{k}\)
Diagnostics}{LOO with Pareto-\textbackslash hat\{k\} Diagnostics}}\label{loo-with-pareto-hatk-diagnostics}

Standard PSIS-LOO is computed for completeness and for comparison
against LFO-CV below. We do not interpret it as a valid measure of
out-of-sample predictive accuracy for a sequential model --- see the
next subsection for why --- but the Pareto-\(\hat{k}\) diagnostic still
localises trials where the path-dependence concern bites hardest.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(fit\_gcm\_single)) \{}
\NormalTok{  log\_lik\_mat    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit\_gcm\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_lik"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  loo\_gcm\_single }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ loo}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{loo}\NormalTok{(log\_lik\_mat, }\AttributeTok{cores =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(loo\_gcm\_single)}

  \FunctionTok{plot}\NormalTok{(loo\_gcm\_single, }\AttributeTok{label\_points =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{main =} \StringTok{"PSIS{-}LOO Pareto{-}k diagnostics: Single{-}subject GCM"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}

Computed from 6000 by 64 log-likelihood matrix.

         Estimate  SE
elpd_loo    -29.2 3.6
p_loo         2.4 0.5
looic        58.4 7.1
------
MCSE of elpd_loo is 0.0.
MCSE and ESS estimates assume independent draws (r_eff=1).

All Pareto k estimates are good (k < 0.7).
See help('pareto-k-diagnostic') for details.
\end{verbatim}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{11-CategorizationModelsExemplars_files/figure-pdf/ch12_loo_single-1.pdf}
\end{center}

\subsubsection{Leave-Future-Out
Cross-Validation}\label{leave-future-out-cross-validation}

\textbf{Why standard LOO is invalid here.} Standard PSIS-LOO assumes
observations are conditionally exchangeable given the parameters. In the
GCM, this assumption is violated: leaving out observation \(t\) also
conceptually removes the memory trace that observation \(t\) contributed
to trials \(t+1, \ldots, T\).

\textbf{What LFO-CV does instead.} LFO-CV (Bürkner, Gabry, \& Vehtari,
2020) estimates the \emph{one-step-ahead} predictive density. The PSIS
approximation refits only when the importance sampling deteriorates
(\(\hat{k} > k_\text{thresh}\)) and uses importance reweighting
otherwise.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────}
\CommentTok{\# psis\_lfo\_gcm: PSIS{-}approximated leave{-}future{-}out CV for the GCM.}
\CommentTok{\# Follows Bürkner, Gabry, \& Vehtari (2020), Algorithm 1.}
\CommentTok{\# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────}
\NormalTok{psis\_lfo\_gcm }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(stan\_model,}
\NormalTok{                         full\_data,}
                         \AttributeTok{L =} \DecValTok{16}\NormalTok{,}
                         \AttributeTok{k\_thresh =} \FloatTok{0.7}\NormalTok{,}
                         \AttributeTok{seed =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}
                         \AttributeTok{verbose =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{) \{}

\NormalTok{  fit\_subset }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(n\_train, seed) \{}
\NormalTok{    sub\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ full\_data}
\NormalTok{    sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{N\_total      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ n\_train}
\NormalTok{    sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{y            }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{y[}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{n\_train]}
\NormalTok{    sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{obs          }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{obs[}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{n\_train, , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{    sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{cat\_feedback }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{cat\_feedback[}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{n\_train]}

\NormalTok{    pf  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stan\_model}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{pathfinder}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ sub\_data, }\AttributeTok{num\_paths =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{,}
                                  \AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ seed)}
\NormalTok{    fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stan\_model}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{sample}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ sub\_data, }\AttributeTok{init =}\NormalTok{ pf, }\AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ seed,}
      \AttributeTok{chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{parallel\_chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup =} \DecValTok{600}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{800}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adapt\_delta =} \FloatTok{0.9}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{    fit}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  predict\_future }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(fit, full\_data) \{}
\NormalTok{    full\_n   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(full\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{y)}
\NormalTok{    ext\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ full\_data}
\NormalTok{    ext\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{N\_total }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ full\_n}

\NormalTok{    gq\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stan\_model}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{generate\_quantities}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{fitted\_params   =}\NormalTok{ fit,}
      \AttributeTok{data            =}\NormalTok{ ext\_data,}
      \AttributeTok{seed            =}\NormalTok{ seed,}
      \AttributeTok{parallel\_chains =} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{    gq\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_lik"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  T\_total      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(full\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{y)}
\NormalTok{  elpd\_lfo     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(T\_total)}
\NormalTok{  elpd\_lfo[]   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}
\NormalTok{  refits       }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{integer}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  k\_history    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  fit\_curr     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_subset}\NormalTok{(L, }\AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ seed)}
\NormalTok{  ll\_full\_curr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{predict\_future}\NormalTok{(fit\_curr, full\_data)}

\NormalTok{  refits       }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(refits, L)}
\NormalTok{  last\_fit\_n   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ L}
\NormalTok{  n\_draws      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(ll\_full\_curr)}

\NormalTok{  ll\_train\_curr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rowSums}\NormalTok{(ll\_full\_curr[, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{L, }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{])}

  \ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (t }\ControlFlowTok{in}\NormalTok{ (L }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{T\_total) \{}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (t }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{==}\NormalTok{ last\_fit\_n) \{}
\NormalTok{      k\_t          }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{      k\_history[t] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ k\_t}
\NormalTok{      lw           }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(n\_draws), n\_draws)}
\NormalTok{    \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{      ll\_train\_target }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rowSums}\NormalTok{(ll\_full\_curr[, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{(t }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{])}
\NormalTok{      log\_w           }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ll\_train\_target }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ ll\_train\_curr}

\NormalTok{      psis\_obj     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ loo}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{psis}\NormalTok{(log\_w, }\AttributeTok{r\_eff =} \ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      k\_t          }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ loo}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pareto\_k\_values}\NormalTok{(psis\_obj)}
\NormalTok{      k\_history[t] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ k\_t}

      \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (k\_t }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ k\_thresh) \{}
        \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (verbose) }\FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Refit at t ="}\NormalTok{, t, }\StringTok{"(k ="}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(k\_t, }\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{")}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{        fit\_curr      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_subset}\NormalTok{(t }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ seed }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t)}
\NormalTok{        ll\_full\_curr  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{predict\_future}\NormalTok{(fit\_curr, full\_data)}
\NormalTok{        ll\_train\_curr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rowSums}\NormalTok{(ll\_full\_curr[, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{(t }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{])}
\NormalTok{        last\_fit\_n    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ t }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \DecValTok{1}
\NormalTok{        refits        }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(refits, last\_fit\_n)}
\NormalTok{        lw            }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(n\_draws), n\_draws)}
\NormalTok{      \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{        lw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{weights}\NormalTok{(psis\_obj))}
\NormalTok{      \}}
\NormalTok{    \}}

\NormalTok{    lp          }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ll\_full\_curr[, t]}
\NormalTok{    elpd\_lfo[t] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ matrixStats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{logSumExp}\NormalTok{(lw }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ lp)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{elpd\_lfo       =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(elpd\_lfo, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{elpd\_pointwise =}\NormalTok{ elpd\_lfo,}
    \AttributeTok{refits         =}\NormalTok{ refits,}
    \AttributeTok{k\_history      =}\NormalTok{ k\_history,}
    \AttributeTok{L              =}\NormalTok{ L}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{lfo\_filepath }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch12\_lfo\_single.rds"}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(lfo\_filepath)) \{}
\NormalTok{  lfo\_single }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{psis\_lfo\_gcm}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{stan\_model =}\NormalTok{ mod\_gcm\_single,}
    \AttributeTok{full\_data  =}\NormalTok{ gcm\_data\_single,}
    \AttributeTok{L          =} \DecValTok{16}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{k\_thresh   =} \FloatTok{0.7}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{seed       =} \DecValTok{11}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{verbose    =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(lfo\_single, lfo\_filepath)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  lfo\_single }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(lfo\_filepath)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"LFO{-}CV ELPD (single subject):"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(lfo\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{elpd\_lfo, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}

\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Number of refits:"}\NormalTok{,             }\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(lfo\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{refits),     }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Refit triggered at trials:"}\NormalTok{,    lfo\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{refits,             }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Refit triggered at trials: 16 
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(fit\_gcm\_single)) \{}
\NormalTok{  loo\_pw  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ loo\_gcm\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pointwise[, }\StringTok{"elpd\_loo"}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  comp\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{trial    =} \FunctionTok{seq\_along}\NormalTok{(loo\_pw),}
    \AttributeTok{elpd\_loo =}\NormalTok{ loo\_pw,}
    \AttributeTok{elpd\_lfo =}\NormalTok{ lfo\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{elpd\_pointwise}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{starts\_with}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"elpd\_"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"method"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"elpd"}\NormalTok{)}

  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(comp\_df, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ trial, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ elpd, }\AttributeTok{color =}\NormalTok{ method)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.7}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{elpd\_loo =} \StringTok{"\#0072B2"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{elpd\_lfo =} \StringTok{"\#D55E00"}\NormalTok{),}
                       \AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"PSIS{-}LFO (correct)"}\NormalTok{,}
                                  \StringTok{"PSIS{-}LOO (invalid for sequential)"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"Per{-}trial ELPD: LOO vs LFO{-}CV"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Differences are largest where the path{-}dependence assumption fails most"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Trial"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Pointwise ELPD"}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"bottom"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\end{center}

\textbf{Validation against exact one-step-ahead refits.}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{exact\_lfo\_grid     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{16}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(gcm\_data\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{y) }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{by =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{exact\_lfo\_filepath }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch12\_exact\_lfo\_single.rds"}\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(exact\_lfo\_filepath)) \{}
\NormalTok{  exact\_results }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(exact\_lfo\_grid, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(n\_train) \{}
\NormalTok{    sub\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gcm\_data\_single}
\NormalTok{    sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{N\_total      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ n\_train}
\NormalTok{    sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{y            }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{y[}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{n\_train]}
\NormalTok{    sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{obs          }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{obs[}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{n\_train, , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{    sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{cat\_feedback }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sub\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{cat\_feedback[}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{n\_train]}

\NormalTok{    pf  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mod\_gcm\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{pathfinder}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ sub\_data, }\AttributeTok{num\_paths =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
                                      \AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ n\_train)}
\NormalTok{    fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mod\_gcm\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{sample}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ sub\_data, }\AttributeTok{init =}\NormalTok{ pf, }\AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ n\_train,}
      \AttributeTok{chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{parallel\_chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup =} \DecValTok{600}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{800}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adapt\_delta =} \FloatTok{0.9}
\NormalTok{    )}

\NormalTok{    ext }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gcm\_data\_single}
\NormalTok{    gq  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mod\_gcm\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{generate\_quantities}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{fitted\_params =}\NormalTok{ fit, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ ext, }\AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ n\_train, }\AttributeTok{parallel\_chains =} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{    ll\_target  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gq}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_lik"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{)[, n\_train }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{    elpd\_exact }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ matrixStats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{logSumExp}\NormalTok{(ll\_target) }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(ll\_target))}

    \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{trial =}\NormalTok{ n\_train }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{elpd\_exact =}\NormalTok{ elpd\_exact)}
\NormalTok{  \})}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(exact\_results, exact\_lfo\_filepath)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  exact\_results }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(exact\_lfo\_filepath)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{psis\_at\_grid }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{trial     =}\NormalTok{ exact\_results}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{trial,}
  \AttributeTok{elpd\_psis =}\NormalTok{ lfo\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{elpd\_pointwise[exact\_results}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{trial]}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{agreement\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ exact\_results }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(psis\_at\_grid, }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"trial"}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(agreement\_df, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ elpd\_exact, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ elpd\_psis)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_abline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{intercept =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{slope =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"red"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"\#0072B2"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"PSIS{-}LFO vs Exact One{-}Step{-}Ahead Refits"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Points should fall on the y = x line if PSIS{-}LFO is calibrated"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Exact ELPD (refit per point)"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"PSIS{-}LFO ELPD"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{coord\_fixed}\NormalTok{()}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsubsection{Randomised LOO-PIT}\label{randomised-loo-pit}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(fit\_gcm\_single)) \{}
\NormalTok{  prob\_draws  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit\_gcm\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"prob\_cat1"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  log\_lik\_mat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit\_gcm\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_lik"}\NormalTok{,   }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"matrix"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  psis\_obj }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ loo}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{psis}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{log\_lik\_mat, }\AttributeTok{r\_eff =} \ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  lw       }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{weights}\NormalTok{(psis\_obj, }\AttributeTok{normalize =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  y\_obs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gcm\_data\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{y}

\NormalTok{  loo\_p\_cat1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_along}\NormalTok{(y\_obs), }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(t) \{}
\NormalTok{    w }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(lw[, t] }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ matrixStats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{logSumExp}\NormalTok{(lw[, t]))}
    \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(w }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ prob\_draws[, t])}
\NormalTok{  \}, }\FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}

  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2027}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  pit\_vals }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    y\_obs }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{runif}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(y\_obs), }\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ loo\_p\_cat1, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
    \FunctionTok{runif}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(y\_obs), }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{,              }\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ loo\_p\_cat1)}
\NormalTok{  )}

  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{pit =}\NormalTok{ pit\_vals), }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ pit)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_histogram}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =} \FunctionTok{after\_stat}\NormalTok{(density)),}
                   \AttributeTok{bins =} \DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"\#0072B2"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.7}\NormalTok{,}
                   \AttributeTok{boundary =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_hline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{yintercept =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"red"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_x\_continuous}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{limits =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"Randomised LOO{-}PIT for the Single{-}Subject GCM"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"If the model is calibrated, PIT values are Uniform(0,1) (red dashed line)"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Randomised LOO{-}PIT"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Density"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Single-Subject Simulation-Based Calibration Checks
(SBC)}\label{single-subject-simulation-based-calibration-checks-sbc}

SBC checks the internal consistency and calibration of the entire
Bayesian inference procedure across the \emph{whole} prior. It asks:
``If the true parameters really came from our specified priors, would
our inference procedure produce posteriors that are statistically
consistent with those priors?''

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{sbc\_single\_filepath }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch12\_sbc\_single\_results.rds"}\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(sbc\_single\_filepath)) \{}
\NormalTok{  n\_sbc\_iterations\_single }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{500}   \CommentTok{\# use \textgreater{}= 1000 for publication{-}quality SBC}

\NormalTok{  gcm\_single\_sbc\_generator }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{SBC\_generator\_function}\NormalTok{(}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
\NormalTok{      w\_true     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(MCMCpack}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{rdirichlet}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{      log\_c\_true }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, LOG\_C\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_C\_PRIOR\_SD)}
\NormalTok{      c\_true     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(log\_c\_true)}
\NormalTok{      bias\_true  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rbeta}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{      sbc\_schedule }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_subject\_schedule}\NormalTok{(stimulus\_info, n\_blocks,}
                                            \AttributeTok{seed =} \FunctionTok{sample.int}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1e8}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{      sim }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gcm\_simulate}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{w            =}\NormalTok{ w\_true,}
        \AttributeTok{c            =}\NormalTok{ c\_true,}
        \AttributeTok{bias         =}\NormalTok{ bias\_true,}
        \AttributeTok{obs          =}\NormalTok{ sbc\_schedule }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(height, position),}
        \AttributeTok{cat\_feedback =}\NormalTok{ sbc\_schedule}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback}
\NormalTok{      )}

      \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
          \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{w[1]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ w\_true[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],}
          \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{w[2]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ w\_true[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{],}
          \AttributeTok{log\_c  =}\NormalTok{ log\_c\_true,}
          \AttributeTok{bias   =}\NormalTok{ bias\_true}
\NormalTok{        ),}
        \AttributeTok{generated =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{N\_total           =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(sbc\_schedule),}
          \AttributeTok{N\_features        =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L,}
          \AttributeTok{y                 =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(sim}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sim\_response),}
          \AttributeTok{obs               =} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(sbc\_schedule[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)]),}
          \AttributeTok{cat\_feedback      =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(sbc\_schedule}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback),}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_w\_alpha     =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_log\_c\_mu    =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_C\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_log\_c\_sigma =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_C\_PRIOR\_SD,}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_bias\_alpha  =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_bias\_beta   =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}
          \AttributeTok{run\_diagnostics   =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{        )}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  gcm\_single\_sbc\_backend }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{SBC\_backend\_cmdstan\_sample}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    mod\_gcm\_single,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup   =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{chains        =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{adapt\_delta   =} \FloatTok{0.9}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh       =} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  gcm\_single\_datasets }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_datasets}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    gcm\_single\_sbc\_generator,}
    \AttributeTok{n\_sims =}\NormalTok{ n\_sbc\_iterations\_single}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  sbc\_results\_single }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_SBC}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    gcm\_single\_datasets,}
\NormalTok{    gcm\_single\_sbc\_backend,}
    \AttributeTok{cache\_mode     =} \StringTok{"results"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{cache\_location =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch12\_sbc\_single\_cache"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{keep\_fits      =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(sbc\_results\_single, sbc\_single\_filepath)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"SBC single{-}subject results computed and saved.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  sbc\_results\_single }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(sbc\_single\_filepath)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Loaded existing SBC single{-}subject results.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
Loaded existing SBC single-subject results.
\end{verbatim}

\end{Highlighting}
