\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_prior_sensitivity-1.pdf}
\end{center}

\texttt{powerscale\_sensitivity()} perturbs the prior analytically
(without re-running MCMC) and reports a sensitivity index \(\psi\) for
each parameter. A value \(\psi > 0.1\) indicates structural fragility
--- the conclusion depends materially on the specific prior choice. For
a model with two parameters and moderately informative priors on
\(\log r\) and \(\log q\), \(\psi\) should be small but non-zero. Under
the static Kruschke paradigm, \(\log q\) may show higher sensitivity
than \(\log r\) because the data are less informative about it. The
accompanying density plot overlays posteriors at three power-scaling
levels and lets the reader see whether the shape of each posterior is
robust or whether a slightly different prior would push it elsewhere.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Simulation-Based Calibration Checks
(SBC)}\label{simulation-based-calibration-checks-sbc-3}

Parameter recovery at specific true values is a necessary but not
sufficient validation. SBC checks that the full posterior is correctly
calibrated across the entire prior distribution --- that if the true
\texttt{log\_r} and \texttt{log\_q} were drawn from their priors, the
posterior would on average contain each true value in the appropriate
fraction of its probability mass. We use the \texttt{SBC} package for
consistency with Chapters 6, 8, and 11.

This is \textbf{proper SBC in the Talts--Vehtari sense}: data are drawn
from the \emph{same} generative model that is then fitted. (This is in
contrast to Chapter 13's ``cross-model calibration'' check, where data
come from a particle filter and are fitted with a different mixture
model --- that procedure tests robustness, not calibration.) The
prototype model's two scalar parameters make the resulting
ECDF-difference plot particularly legible: the \texttt{log\_r} curve
should show tight calibration (the data are informative), while the
\texttt{log\_q} curve may be wider under the static paradigm (partial
confound with \texttt{log\_r}).

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{sbc\_proto\_filepath }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_sbc\_proto\_results.rds"}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(sbc\_proto\_filepath)) \{}
\NormalTok{  n\_sbc\_iterations\_proto }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{500}   \CommentTok{\# use \textgreater{}= 1000 for publication{-}quality SBC}

\NormalTok{  proto\_sbc\_generator }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{SBC\_generator\_function}\NormalTok{(}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
      \CommentTok{\# 1a. Draw true parameters from their priors}
\NormalTok{      log\_r\_true }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD)}
\NormalTok{      r\_true     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(log\_r\_true)}
\NormalTok{      log\_q\_true }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_SD)}
\NormalTok{      q\_true     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(log\_q\_true)}

      \CommentTok{\# 1b. Simulate one dataset with its own randomized schedule}
\NormalTok{      sbc\_sched }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_subject\_schedule}\NormalTok{(stimulus\_info, n\_blocks,}
                                         \AttributeTok{seed =} \FunctionTok{sample.int}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1e8}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{      sim       }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{prototype\_kalman}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{r\_value    =}\NormalTok{ r\_true,}
        \AttributeTok{q\_value    =}\NormalTok{ q\_true,}
        \AttributeTok{obs        =} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(sbc\_sched[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)]),}
        \AttributeTok{cat\_one    =}\NormalTok{ sbc\_sched}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback,}
        \AttributeTok{initial\_mu =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{      )}

      \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{log\_r =}\NormalTok{ log\_r\_true, }\AttributeTok{log\_q =}\NormalTok{ log\_q\_true),}
        \AttributeTok{generated =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{ntrials            =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(sbc\_sched),}
          \AttributeTok{nfeatures          =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L,}
          \AttributeTok{cat\_one            =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(sbc\_sched}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback),}
          \AttributeTok{y                  =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(sim}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sim\_response),}
          \AttributeTok{obs                =} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(sbc\_sched[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)]),}
          \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat0    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
          \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat1    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
          \AttributeTok{initial\_sigma\_diag =} \FloatTok{10.0}\NormalTok{,}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_logr\_mean    =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_logr\_sd      =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD,}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_logq\_mean    =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_logq\_sd      =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_SD}
\NormalTok{        )}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  proto\_sbc\_backend }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{SBC\_backend\_cmdstan\_sample}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    mod\_prototype\_single,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup   =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{chains        =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{adapt\_delta   =} \FloatTok{0.9}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh       =} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  proto\_datasets }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_datasets}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    proto\_sbc\_generator,}
    \AttributeTok{n\_sims =}\NormalTok{ n\_sbc\_iterations\_proto}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  sbc\_results\_proto }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_SBC}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    proto\_datasets,}
\NormalTok{    proto\_sbc\_backend,}
    \AttributeTok{cache\_mode     =} \StringTok{"results"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{cache\_location =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_sbc\_proto\_cache"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{keep\_fits      =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(sbc\_results\_proto, sbc\_proto\_filepath)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"SBC prototype results computed and saved.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  sbc\_results\_proto }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(sbc\_proto\_filepath)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Loaded existing SBC prototype results.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# ── Diagnostic issue investigation ───────────────────────────────────────────}
\NormalTok{backend\_diags  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sbc\_results\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{backend\_diagnostics}
\NormalTok{default\_diags  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sbc\_results\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{default\_diagnostics }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(sim\_id, max\_rhat, min\_ess\_to\_rank)}
\NormalTok{true\_params\_wide }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sbc\_results\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{stats }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(sim\_id, variable, simulated\_value) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pivot\_wider}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{names\_from =}\NormalTok{ variable, }\AttributeTok{values\_from =}\NormalTok{ simulated\_value)}

\NormalTok{diag\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ backend\_diags }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(default\_diags,    }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"sim\_id"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(true\_params\_wide, }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"sim\_id"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{has\_issue =}\NormalTok{ n\_divergent }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{|}\NormalTok{ n\_max\_treedepth }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{|}\NormalTok{ max\_rhat }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \FloatTok{1.01}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{p\_diag\_r\_q }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(diag\_df, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ log\_r, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ log\_q, }\AttributeTok{color =}\NormalTok{ has\_issue)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.7}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"FALSE"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#0072B2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"TRUE"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#D55E00"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"Diagnostic Issues in Parameter Space"}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Orange points: divergence, max treedepth, or Rhat \textgreater{} 1.01"}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"True log(r)"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"True log(q)"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"bottom"}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(p\_diag\_r\_q)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# ── Parameter recovery on SBC simulations ────────────────────────────────────}
\NormalTok{recovery\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sbc\_results\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{stats}

\NormalTok{p\_sbc\_recovery }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(recovery\_df, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ simulated\_value, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ mean)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"\#0072B2"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_abline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{intercept =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{slope =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"red"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{variable, }\AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{"free"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"Parameter Recovery Across SBC Simulations"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Posterior mean vs True generated value"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"True Value (simulated\_value)"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Estimated Value (Posterior Mean)"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_bw}\NormalTok{()}

\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(p\_sbc\_recovery)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_sbc_prototype-4.pdf}
\end{center}

\textbf{Reading the SBC output.} With two parameters, the
ECDF-difference plot shows two curves (\texttt{log\_r} and
\texttt{log\_q}) that should each stay inside the grey simultaneous
confidence band. Systematic deviations indicate specific failure modes:

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
  \textbf{U-shape} in the rank histogram (high at the edges): the
  posterior is \emph{overconfident} --- credible intervals are too
  narrow and miss the truth at the tails. Action: widen the prior, or
  check whether the Kalman filter implementation is leaking information
  forward.
\item
  \textbf{Hump} in the centre: the posterior is \emph{underconfident}
  --- credible intervals are too wide. Action: tighten the prior, or
  check whether \texttt{log\_r} is being doubly-penalised somewhere.
\item
  \textbf{Monotone drift} (skewed left or right): a directional bias in
  \(\log r\). Action: re-derive the Stan code from scratch and compare
  against the R simulator on a single agent. The most common cause is a
  sign error or off-by-one in the Kalman update.
\end{itemize}

For the production version of this material we recommend \(S \geq 1000\)
iterations. The \(S = 500\) version above is illustrative.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{\texorpdfstring{Non-Stationary Environments: When Does \(q\)
Become
Identifiable?}{Non-Stationary Environments: When Does q Become Identifiable?}}\label{non-stationary-environments-when-does-q-become-identifiable}

The SBC result above exposes a structural problem. Under the static
Kruschke paradigm, \(\log r\) is cleanly recovered but \(\log q\) is not
--- its ECDF-difference curve drifts outside the simultaneous band and
its posterior often collapses toward the prior. This is not a coding bug
or a sampler problem: it is a genuine identifiability failure caused by
a mismatch between the \emph{parameter} (process noise on prototype
drift) and the \emph{task} (fixed category centres with no drift to
track).

Three generative processes stress this identifiability question
differently. We implement all three and run the full validation battery
on each.

As established in the canonical scenario framework introduced in Chapter
11, all three categorization chapters use the same three scenarios in
the same order (static → contingent shift → drift), reflecting
increasing assumption match between the scenario's data-generating
process and the model's structural commitments.

\begin{enumerate}
\def\labelenumi{\arabic{enumi}.}
\tightlist
\item
  \textbf{Static Kruschke (baseline).} Fixed category labels. The Kalman
  filter's process-noise prior assumes smooth Gaussian drift; under
  stationary data, no amount of \(q\) improves fit once transient
  learning is over. We expect \(\log q\) to remain weakly identified ---
  this is the failure case we need to diagnose clearly.
\item
  \textbf{Performance-contingent abrupt shifts.} After the agent reaches
  a streak of \(k\) consecutive correct responses, all category labels
  flip. Post-flip recovery is \emph{fast} for agents whose \(q\) lets
  the covariance re-inflate after surprise, and \emph{slow} for agents
  whose \(q\) is tiny --- so \(q\) acquires a direct behavioural
  signature. But the true process has abrupt jumps, which the filter's
  Gaussian-drift prior does not literally contain; this is a
  misspecified-but-informative scenario. Note that these shifts are
  \emph{endogenous} to the agent's own accuracy --- a noisier agent
  triggers fewer flips and accumulates less information about \(q\) (see
  Chapter 11 for discussion).
\item
  \textbf{Smooth drift.} Category centres in feature space follow an
  independent random walk; labels are assigned trial-by-trial by
  proximity to the current drifted centres. This is the
  \textbf{assumption-matched} scenario: the Kalman filter's generative
  story (prototypes drift as Gaussian random walks) is now literally
  true of the environment. We expect \(\log q\) to be cleanly identified
  and SBC to pass.
\end{enumerate}

The three scenarios span the spectrum of assumption match ---
\textbf{none → misspecified → exact} --- and the SBC signatures should
sort in that order.

\subsection{Assumption Match Across
Scenarios}\label{assumption-match-across-scenarios-1}

\begin{longtable}[]{@{}
  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{(\linewidth - 6\tabcolsep) * \real{0.2500}}
  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{(\linewidth - 6\tabcolsep) * \real{0.2500}}
  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{(\linewidth - 6\tabcolsep) * \real{0.2500}}
  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{(\linewidth - 6\tabcolsep) * \real{0.2500}}@{}}
\toprule\noalign{}
\begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Scenario
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
What drifts in the world
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
What the Kalman filter assumes
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Match
\end{minipage} \\
\midrule\noalign{}
\endhead
\bottomrule\noalign{}
\endlastfoot
Static & Nothing & Gaussian drift & \textbf{Misspecified} (but harmless:
\(q = 0\) limit works) \\
Contingent shift & Abrupt label reversals & Gaussian drift &
\textbf{Misspecified} (filter smooths the reversal) \\
Smooth drift & Gaussian-like centre drift & Gaussian drift &
\textbf{Exact} (this is the model's native story) \\
\end{longtable}

This is the mirror of Chapter 11's GCM-with-decay analysis: the GCM's
decay kernel fits contingent shifts as well as drift (because ``forget
old stuff'' is a general-purpose mechanism), while the Kalman filter's
smooth-drift prior fits smooth drift cleanly and reversals only
approximately.

\subsection{Scenario-Aware Simulator}\label{scenario-aware-simulator}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{simulate\_prototype\_scenario }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(r\_value, q\_value, schedule,}
                                        \AttributeTok{scenario =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"static"}\NormalTok{,}
                                                     \StringTok{"contingent\_shift"}\NormalTok{,}
                                                     \StringTok{"drift"}\NormalTok{),}
                                        \AttributeTok{streak\_target      =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{,}
                                        \AttributeTok{drift\_traj         =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
                                        \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat0    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
                                        \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat1    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
                                        \AttributeTok{initial\_sigma\_diag =} \FloatTok{10.0}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  scenario }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{match.arg}\NormalTok{(scenario)}
\NormalTok{  ntrials  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(schedule)}
\NormalTok{  obs\_mat  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(schedule[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)])}
\NormalTok{  base\_lab }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ schedule}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback}
\NormalTok{  nfeat    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L}

\NormalTok{  mu0    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ initial\_mu\_cat0}
\NormalTok{  mu1    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ initial\_mu\_cat1}
\NormalTok{  sigma0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{diag}\NormalTok{(initial\_sigma\_diag, nfeat)}
\NormalTok{  sigma1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{diag}\NormalTok{(initial\_sigma\_diag, nfeat)}
\NormalTok{  R\_mat  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{diag}\NormalTok{(r\_value, nfeat)}
\NormalTok{  Q\_mat  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{diag}\NormalTok{(q\_value, nfeat)}
\NormalTok{  I\_mat  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{diag}\NormalTok{(nfeat)}

\NormalTok{  label\_flip }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  streak     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L}

\NormalTok{  prob\_cat1         }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(ntrials)}
\NormalTok{  sim\_response      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{integer}\NormalTok{(ntrials)}
\NormalTok{  observed\_feedback }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{integer}\NormalTok{(ntrials)}
\NormalTok{  label\_flip\_trace  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(ntrials)}

  \ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (i }\ControlFlowTok{in} \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(ntrials)) \{}
\NormalTok{    x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(obs\_mat[i, ])}

    \CommentTok{\# ── Prediction step ──────────────────────────────────────────────}
\NormalTok{    sigma0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sigma0 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ Q\_mat}
\NormalTok{    sigma1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sigma1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ Q\_mat}

    \CommentTok{\# ── Decision ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────}
\NormalTok{    cov0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sigma0 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ R\_mat}
\NormalTok{    cov1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sigma1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ R\_mat}
\NormalTok{    lp0  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(mvtnorm}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{dmvnorm}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{mean =}\NormalTok{ mu0, }\AttributeTok{sigma =}\NormalTok{ cov0, }\AttributeTok{log =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
                     \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\ConstantTok{Inf}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    lp1  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(mvtnorm}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{dmvnorm}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{mean =}\NormalTok{ mu1, }\AttributeTok{sigma =}\NormalTok{ cov1, }\AttributeTok{log =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
                     \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\ConstantTok{Inf}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    m    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(lp0, lp1)}
\NormalTok{    p    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(lp1 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ (m }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(lp0 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ m) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(lp1 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ m))))}
\NormalTok{    p    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{pmax}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1e{-}9}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{pmin}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}} \FloatTok{1e{-}9}\NormalTok{, p))}
\NormalTok{    prob\_cat1[i]    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ p}
\NormalTok{    sim\_response[i] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rbinom}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, p)}

    \CommentTok{\# ── Observed feedback depends on the scenario ────────────────────}
\NormalTok{    fb }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{switch}\NormalTok{(scenario,}
      \AttributeTok{static           =}\NormalTok{ base\_lab[i],}
      \AttributeTok{contingent\_shift =} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (label\_flip) }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ base\_lab[i] }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ base\_lab[i],}
      \AttributeTok{drift            =}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{        d0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(x }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ drift\_traj}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mu0[i, ]))}
\NormalTok{        d1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(x }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ drift\_traj}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mu1[i, ]))}
        \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(d1 }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ d0)}
\NormalTok{      \}}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{    observed\_feedback[i] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fb}
\NormalTok{    label\_flip\_trace[i]  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ label\_flip}

    \CommentTok{\# Update the streak/flip state for the contingent scenario}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (scenario }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"contingent\_shift"}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{      streak }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (sim\_response[i] }\SpecialCharTok{==}\NormalTok{ fb) streak }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L }\ControlFlowTok{else} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L}
      \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (streak }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=}\NormalTok{ streak\_target) \{ label\_flip }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{label\_flip; streak }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L \}}
\NormalTok{    \}}

    \CommentTok{\# ── Measurement update for the observed{-}feedback category ────────}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (fb }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{      innov  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ x }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ mu1}
\NormalTok{      S      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sigma1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ R\_mat}
\NormalTok{      K      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sigma1 }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%} \FunctionTok{solve}\NormalTok{(S)}
\NormalTok{      mu1    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(mu1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ K }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%}\NormalTok{ innov)}
\NormalTok{      IK     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ I\_mat }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ K}
\NormalTok{      sigma1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ IK }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%}\NormalTok{ sigma1 }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%} \FunctionTok{t}\NormalTok{(IK) }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ K }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%}\NormalTok{ R\_mat }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%} \FunctionTok{t}\NormalTok{(K)}
\NormalTok{      sigma1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (sigma1 }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{t}\NormalTok{(sigma1)) }\SpecialCharTok{/} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{    \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{      innov  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ x }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ mu0}
\NormalTok{      S      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sigma0 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ R\_mat}
\NormalTok{      K      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sigma0 }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%} \FunctionTok{solve}\NormalTok{(S)}
\NormalTok{      mu0    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(mu0 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ K }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%}\NormalTok{ innov)}
\NormalTok{      IK     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ I\_mat }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ K}
\NormalTok{      sigma0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ IK }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%}\NormalTok{ sigma0 }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%} \FunctionTok{t}\NormalTok{(IK) }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ K }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%}\NormalTok{ R\_mat }\SpecialCharTok{\%*\%} \FunctionTok{t}\NormalTok{(K)}
\NormalTok{      sigma0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (sigma0 }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{t}\NormalTok{(sigma0)) }\SpecialCharTok{/} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  schedule }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{prob\_cat1         =}\NormalTok{ prob\_cat1,}
      \AttributeTok{sim\_response      =}\NormalTok{ sim\_response,}
      \AttributeTok{observed\_feedback =}\NormalTok{ observed\_feedback,}
      \AttributeTok{label\_flip        =}\NormalTok{ label\_flip\_trace,}
      \AttributeTok{correct           =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(sim\_response }\SpecialCharTok{==}\NormalTok{ observed\_feedback)}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Drift Trajectory
Generator}\label{drift-trajectory-generator-1}

The drift scenario pre-computes a trajectory for both category centres
as independent bivariate Gaussian random walks.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{make\_drift\_trajectory }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(ntrials, }\AttributeTok{drift\_sigma =} \FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{seed =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(seed)}
\NormalTok{  mu0\_init }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1.75}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{3.25}\NormalTok{)   }\CommentTok{\# Kruschke cat{-}0 mean (height, position)}
\NormalTok{  mu1\_init }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{3.25}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{1.75}\NormalTok{)   }\CommentTok{\# Kruschke cat{-}1 mean}
\NormalTok{  d0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{apply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{matrix}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(ntrials }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, drift\_sigma), }\AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, cumsum)}
\NormalTok{  d1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{apply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{matrix}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(ntrials }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, drift\_sigma), }\AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, cumsum)}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{mu0 =} \FunctionTok{sweep}\NormalTok{(d0, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, mu0\_init, }\StringTok{"+"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{mu1 =} \FunctionTok{sweep}\NormalTok{(d1, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, mu1\_init, }\StringTok{"+"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Scenario Agent Wrapper}\label{scenario-agent-wrapper}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{simulate\_prototype\_agent\_scenario }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(agent\_id, scenario,}
\NormalTok{                                              r\_value, q\_value,}
\NormalTok{                                              subject\_seed,}
                                              \AttributeTok{streak\_target =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{,}
                                              \AttributeTok{drift\_sigma   =} \FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  schedule }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_subject\_schedule}\NormalTok{(stimulus\_info, n\_blocks, }\AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ subject\_seed)}
\NormalTok{  drift\_tr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (scenario }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"drift"}\NormalTok{)}
    \FunctionTok{make\_drift\_trajectory}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(schedule), drift\_sigma, }\AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ subject\_seed)}
  \ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NULL}

\NormalTok{  out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{simulate\_prototype\_scenario}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{r\_value       =}\NormalTok{ r\_value,}
    \AttributeTok{q\_value       =}\NormalTok{ q\_value,}
    \AttributeTok{schedule      =}\NormalTok{ schedule,}
    \AttributeTok{scenario      =}\NormalTok{ scenario,}
    \AttributeTok{streak\_target =}\NormalTok{ streak\_target,}
    \AttributeTok{drift\_traj    =}\NormalTok{ drift\_tr}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  out }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{agent\_id     =}\NormalTok{ agent\_id,}
      \AttributeTok{scenario     =}\NormalTok{ scenario,}
      \AttributeTok{r\_value\_true =}\NormalTok{ r\_value,}
      \AttributeTok{q\_value\_true =}\NormalTok{ q\_value,}
      \AttributeTok{log\_r\_true   =} \FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(r\_value),}
      \AttributeTok{log\_q\_true   =} \FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(q\_value)}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(agent\_id) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{performance =} \FunctionTok{cumsum}\NormalTok{(correct) }\SpecialCharTok{/} \FunctionTok{row\_number}\NormalTok{()) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{ungroup}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Visualising the Three
Scenarios}\label{visualising-the-three-scenarios-1}

We simulate 10 agents per cell across a 3 × 3 grid of scenarios × \(q\)
values (at fixed \(r = 1.5\)) and plot cumulative accuracy.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{scenario\_viz\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_scenario\_viz.csv"}\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(scenario\_viz\_file)) \{}
\NormalTok{  viz\_grid }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{expand\_grid}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{scenario    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"static"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"contingent\_shift"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"drift"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{q\_value     =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.6}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{agent\_id    =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{10}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{subject\_seed =} \DecValTok{30000} \SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{row\_number}\NormalTok{())}

\NormalTok{  viz\_sim }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{pmap\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{agent\_id     =}\NormalTok{ viz\_grid}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{agent\_id,}
         \AttributeTok{scenario     =}\NormalTok{ viz\_grid}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{scenario,}
         \AttributeTok{q\_value      =}\NormalTok{ viz\_grid}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{q\_value,}
         \AttributeTok{subject\_seed =}\NormalTok{ viz\_grid}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{subject\_seed),}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(agent\_id, scenario, q\_value, subject\_seed) \{}
      \FunctionTok{simulate\_prototype\_agent\_scenario}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{agent\_id     =}\NormalTok{ agent\_id,}
        \AttributeTok{scenario     =}\NormalTok{ scenario,}
        \AttributeTok{r\_value      =} \FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{,}
        \AttributeTok{q\_value      =}\NormalTok{ q\_value,}
        \AttributeTok{subject\_seed =}\NormalTok{ subject\_seed}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv}\NormalTok{(viz\_sim, scenario\_viz\_file)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  viz\_sim }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(scenario\_viz\_file, }\AttributeTok{show\_col\_types =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(viz\_sim,}
       \FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ trial\_within\_subject, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ cumulative\_accuracy,}
           \AttributeTok{color =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(q\_value\_true))) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{stat\_summary}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fun =}\NormalTok{ mean, }\AttributeTok{geom =} \StringTok{"line"}\NormalTok{,}
               \FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{group =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(q\_value\_true)), }\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{1.1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{stat\_summary}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fun.data =}\NormalTok{ mean\_se, }\AttributeTok{geom =} \StringTok{"ribbon"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{,}
               \FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fill =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(q\_value\_true), }\AttributeTok{group =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(q\_value\_true)),}
               \AttributeTok{color =} \ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{scenario, }\AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
             \AttributeTok{labeller =} \FunctionTok{as\_labeller}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
               \AttributeTok{static           =} \StringTok{"Static Kruschke"}\NormalTok{,}
               \AttributeTok{contingent\_shift =} \StringTok{"Performance{-}contingent flips"}\NormalTok{,}
               \AttributeTok{drift            =} \StringTok{"Smooth drift"}\NormalTok{))) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_viridis\_d}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{option =} \StringTok{"plasma"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{name =} \StringTok{"q"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_viridis\_d}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{option  =} \StringTok{"plasma"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{name =} \StringTok{"q"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_hline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{yintercept =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"Prototype Learning Curves Across Scenarios"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Mean ± SE across 10 agents per cell; r = 1.5"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Trial"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Cumulative accuracy"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"bottom"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_scenario_viz-1.pdf}
\end{center}

\textbf{Reading the panels.} The static panel looks much like the plots
earlier in the chapter --- accuracy climbs, asymptotes below ceiling for
larger \(q\) (because the covariance never fully shrinks). The
contingent-shift panel shows characteristic sawtooth recovery: higher
\(q\) produces sharper but faster-rebounding dips. The drift panel shows
all three \(q\) curves plateauing below ceiling, with the plateau
highest for the \(q\) tuned to the environmental drift amplitude.

\subsection{Fitting One Agent per Scenario (Original
Parameterisation)}\label{fitting-one-agent-per-scenario-original-parameterisation}

We pick one representative agent per scenario with \(r = 1.5\),
\(q = 0.15\), and fit the Kalman prototype model (original
\texttt{(log\_r,\ log\_q)} parameterisation) to each.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{scenario\_fit\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simmodels"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_prototype\_scenario\_fits.rds"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{scenario\_single\_fit\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{static           =} \FunctionTok{simulate\_prototype\_agent\_scenario}\NormalTok{(}
                        \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"static"}\NormalTok{,           }\AttributeTok{r\_value =} \FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{q\_value =} \FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{,}
                        \AttributeTok{subject\_seed =} \DecValTok{40001}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{contingent\_shift =} \FunctionTok{simulate\_prototype\_agent\_scenario}\NormalTok{(}
                        \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"contingent\_shift"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{r\_value =} \FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{q\_value =} \FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{,}
                        \AttributeTok{subject\_seed =} \DecValTok{40002}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{drift            =} \FunctionTok{simulate\_prototype\_agent\_scenario}\NormalTok{(}
                        \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"drift"}\NormalTok{,            }\AttributeTok{r\_value =} \FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{q\_value =} \FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{,}
                        \AttributeTok{subject\_seed =} \DecValTok{40003}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{stan\_data\_from\_scenario\_agent }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(agent\_df) \{}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{ntrials            =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(agent\_df),}
    \AttributeTok{nfeatures          =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L,}
    \AttributeTok{cat\_one            =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(agent\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{observed\_feedback),}
    \AttributeTok{y                  =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(agent\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sim\_response),}
    \AttributeTok{obs                =} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(agent\_df[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)]),}
    \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat0    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat1    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{initial\_sigma\_diag =} \FloatTok{10.0}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{prior\_logr\_mean    =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
    \AttributeTok{prior\_logr\_sd      =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD,}
    \AttributeTok{prior\_logq\_mean    =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
    \AttributeTok{prior\_logq\_sd      =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_SD}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(scenario\_fit\_file)) \{}
\NormalTok{  scenario\_fits }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ purrr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{imap}\NormalTok{(scenario\_single\_fit\_data, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(agent\_df, scen) \{}
\NormalTok{    dat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{stan\_data\_from\_scenario\_agent}\NormalTok{(agent\_df)}
\NormalTok{    pf  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      mod\_prototype\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{pathfinder}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ dat, }\AttributeTok{num\_paths =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
                                      \AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{seed =} \DecValTok{500}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\ConstantTok{NULL}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{    fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mod\_prototype\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{sample}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{data            =}\NormalTok{ dat,}
      \AttributeTok{init            =} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(pf)) pf }\ControlFlowTok{else} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{,}

      \AttributeTok{chains          =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{parallel\_chains =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{availableCores}\NormalTok{()),}
      \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup     =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling   =} \DecValTok{1500}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{refresh         =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{adapt\_delta     =} \FloatTok{0.9}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{    fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{save\_object}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simmodels"}\NormalTok{,}
                         \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ch13\_prototype\_scenario\_"}\NormalTok{, scen, }\StringTok{".rds"}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{    fit}
\NormalTok{  \})}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(scenario\_fits, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(f) f}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{output\_files}\NormalTok{()),}
\NormalTok{          scenario\_fit\_file)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Scenario fits computed and saved.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  scenario\_fits }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(scenario\_single\_fit\_data), }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scen) \{}
      \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simmodels"}\NormalTok{,}
                   \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ch13\_prototype\_scenario\_"}\NormalTok{, scen, }\StringTok{".rds"}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{    \}),}
    \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(scenario\_single\_fit\_data)}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Loaded existing scenario fits.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"=== Pair plot:"}\NormalTok{, scen, }\StringTok{"===}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}

\begin{verbatim}
=== Pair plot: static ===
\end{verbatim}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_scenario_diagnostics-1.pdf}
\end{center}

\begin{verbatim}
=== Pair plot: contingent_shift ===
\end{verbatim}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_scenario_diagnostics-2.pdf}
\end{center}

\begin{verbatim}
=== Pair plot: drift ===
\end{verbatim}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_scenario_diagnostics-3.pdf}
\end{center}

\textbf{What the pair plots reveal.} On static data the
\texttt{(log\_r,\ log\_q)} posterior sits on a strongly
negatively-correlated ridge --- the canonical identifiability failure.
On contingent-shift data the ridge is shorter and tilted: reversal
dynamics load on \(q\) specifically, so the degrees of freedom are no
longer degenerate. On drift data the posterior is roughly circular in
the two parameters; this is the visual signature of the
assumption-matched case.

\subsection{Prior → Posterior Updates Across
Scenarios}\label{prior-posterior-updates-across-scenarios}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{scenario\_pp\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ purrr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{imap\_dfr}\NormalTok{(scenario\_fits, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(fit, scen) \{}
\NormalTok{  d }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as\_draws\_df}\NormalTok{(fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_r"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"log\_q"}\NormalTok{)))}
  \FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{scenario =}\NormalTok{ scen, }\AttributeTok{parameter =} \StringTok{"log\_r"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{value =}\NormalTok{ d}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{log\_r, }\AttributeTok{source =} \StringTok{"posterior"}\NormalTok{),}
    \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{scenario =}\NormalTok{ scen, }\AttributeTok{parameter =} \StringTok{"log\_q"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{value =}\NormalTok{ d}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{log\_q, }\AttributeTok{source =} \StringTok{"posterior"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\})}

\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{21}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{n\_prior }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{4000}
\NormalTok{prior\_ref }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{parameter =} \StringTok{"log\_r"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{value =} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n\_prior, LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD),}
         \AttributeTok{source =} \StringTok{"prior"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{parameter =} \StringTok{"log\_q"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{value =} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n\_prior, LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_SD),}
         \AttributeTok{source =} \StringTok{"prior"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{crossing}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{scenario =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"static"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"contingent\_shift"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"drift"}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{truth\_lines }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{parameter =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_r"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"log\_q"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{value     =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(prior\_ref, scenario\_pp\_df),}
       \FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ value, }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ source, }\AttributeTok{color =}\NormalTok{ source)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_density}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_vline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ truth\_lines, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xintercept =}\NormalTok{ value),}
             \AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"red"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_grid}\NormalTok{(scenario }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ parameter, }\AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{"free"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values  =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{prior =} \StringTok{"grey70"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{posterior =} \StringTok{"\#009E73"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{prior =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{posterior =} \StringTok{"\#006D4E"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"Prior → Posterior Update: Prototype Model Across Scenarios"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Red dashed line = true generating value used for the single{-}agent fit"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Density"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_scenario_prior_posterior-1.pdf}
\end{center}

The density of \texttt{log\_q} narrows visibly across scenarios: from
prior-like on static data (information-starved), to sharply peaked
around the truth on drift data (assumption-matched).

\subsection{One-Shot Parameter Recovery Across
Scenarios}\label{one-shot-parameter-recovery-across-scenarios-1}

We sweep a 3 × 3 grid of \((r, q)\) truths with 5 iterations per cell
per scenario (135 fits) and plot recovery on the log scale.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{scenario\_recovery\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_scenario\_recovery\_results.rds"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{run\_proto\_scenario\_recovery\_iter }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scenario, r\_true, q\_true, iteration) \{}
\NormalTok{  subject\_seed }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ iteration }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{10000} \SpecialCharTok{+}
                   \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(r\_true }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
                   \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(q\_true }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
                   \ControlFlowTok{switch}\NormalTok{(scenario, }\AttributeTok{static =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{contingent\_shift =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{drift =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  agent\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{simulate\_prototype\_agent\_scenario}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{agent\_id     =}\NormalTok{ iteration,}
    \AttributeTok{scenario     =}\NormalTok{ scenario,}
    \AttributeTok{r\_value      =}\NormalTok{ r\_true,}
    \AttributeTok{q\_value      =}\NormalTok{ q\_true,}
    \AttributeTok{subject\_seed =}\NormalTok{ subject\_seed}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  dat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{stan\_data\_from\_scenario\_agent}\NormalTok{(agent\_df)}
\NormalTok{  pf  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    mod\_prototype\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{pathfinder}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ dat, }\AttributeTok{num\_paths =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
                                    \AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ subject\_seed),}
    \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\ConstantTok{NULL}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    mod\_prototype\_single}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{sample}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{data            =}\NormalTok{ dat,}
      \AttributeTok{init            =} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(pf)) pf }\ControlFlowTok{else} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{seed            =}\NormalTok{ subject\_seed,}
      \AttributeTok{chains          =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{parallel\_chains =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup     =} \DecValTok{800}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling   =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{refresh         =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{adapt\_delta     =} \FloatTok{0.9}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) \{ }\FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Fit error: "}\NormalTok{, e}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{message); }\ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{ \}}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(fit)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  s }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"log\_r"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"log\_q"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  diag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{diagnostic\_summary}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{quiet =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{scenario       =}\NormalTok{ scenario,}
    \AttributeTok{r\_true         =}\NormalTok{ r\_true,}
    \AttributeTok{q\_true         =}\NormalTok{ q\_true,}
    \AttributeTok{iteration      =}\NormalTok{ iteration,}
    \AttributeTok{log\_r\_mean     =}\NormalTok{ s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mean[s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{variable }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"log\_r"}\NormalTok{],}
    \AttributeTok{log\_q\_mean     =}\NormalTok{ s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mean[s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{variable }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"log\_q"}\NormalTok{],}
    \AttributeTok{log\_r\_q5       =}\NormalTok{ s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{q5[s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{variable }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"log\_r"}\NormalTok{],}
    \AttributeTok{log\_r\_q95      =}\NormalTok{ s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{q95[s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{variable }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"log\_r"}\NormalTok{],}
    \AttributeTok{log\_q\_q5       =}\NormalTok{ s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{q5[s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{variable }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"log\_q"}\NormalTok{],}
    \AttributeTok{log\_q\_q95      =}\NormalTok{ s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{q95[s}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{variable }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"log\_q"}\NormalTok{],}
    \AttributeTok{had\_divergence =} \FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(diag}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{num\_divergent }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(scenario\_recovery\_file)) \{}
\NormalTok{  recovery\_plan }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{expand\_grid}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{scenario  =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"static"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"contingent\_shift"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"drift"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{r\_true    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{3.0}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{q\_true    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.6}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{iteration =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}
\NormalTok{  )}

  \FunctionTok{plan}\NormalTok{(multisession, }\AttributeTok{workers =} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{availableCores}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  scenario\_recovery }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{future\_pmap\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{scenario  =}\NormalTok{ recovery\_plan}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{scenario,}
         \AttributeTok{r\_true    =}\NormalTok{ recovery\_plan}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{r\_true,}
         \AttributeTok{q\_true    =}\NormalTok{ recovery\_plan}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{q\_true,}
         \AttributeTok{iteration =}\NormalTok{ recovery\_plan}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{iteration),}
\NormalTok{    run\_proto\_scenario\_recovery\_iter,}
    \AttributeTok{.options =} \FunctionTok{furrr\_options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{seed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{scheduling =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{plan}\NormalTok{(sequential)}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(scenario\_recovery, scenario\_recovery\_file)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Scenario recovery sweep complete.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  scenario\_recovery }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(scenario\_recovery\_file)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Loaded existing scenario recovery sweep.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
Loaded existing scenario recovery sweep.
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{scenario\_recovery\_long }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ scenario\_recovery }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(scenario, r\_true, q\_true, iteration, had\_divergence,}
\NormalTok{                log\_r\_mean, log\_q\_mean) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{cols =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(log\_r\_mean, log\_q\_mean),}
               \AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"variable"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"estimated"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{parameter =} \FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(variable }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"log\_r\_mean"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"log\_r"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"log\_q"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{truth     =} \FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(parameter }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"log\_r"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(r\_true), }\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(q\_true))}
\NormalTok{  )}

\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(scenario\_recovery\_long, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ truth, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ estimated,}
                                    \AttributeTok{color =}\NormalTok{ had\_divergence)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_abline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{intercept =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{slope =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.7}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_grid}\NormalTok{(parameter }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ scenario, }\AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{"free"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"FALSE"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#0072B2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"TRUE"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#D55E00"}\NormalTok{),}
                     \AttributeTok{name =} \StringTok{"Had divergence"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"One{-}Shot Parameter Recovery for the Kalman Prototype Model"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Posterior mean vs true generating value; 5 iterations per (r, q) cell, 3 scenarios"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"True value (log scale)"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Estimated value (posterior mean)"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"bottom"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_scenario_recovery_sweep-1.pdf}
\end{center}

\textbf{Interpretation.} The \texttt{log\_r} row is near-diagonal across
scenarios --- \(r\) is identified by within-category decision sharpness,
which every scenario exercises. The \texttt{log\_q} row is the
diagnostic: diffuse scatter on static data (the parameter is
under-constrained), tighter on drift, and comparably tight on
contingent-shift. The contingent-shift result is noteworthy --- the
data-generating process has abrupt jumps that the filter's smooth-drift
prior cannot exactly reproduce, yet recovery still works because
post-shift recovery speed loads specifically on \(q\).

\subsection{Simulation-Based Calibration Checks Across
Scenarios}\label{simulation-based-calibration-checks-across-scenarios-1}

SBC is the formal calibration test. Each scenario gets its own generator
drawing \((\log r, \log q)\) from their priors.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{make\_proto\_sbc\_generator }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scenario) \{}
  \FunctionTok{SBC\_generator\_function}\NormalTok{(}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
\NormalTok{      log\_r\_true }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD)}
\NormalTok{      log\_q\_true }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_SD)}
\NormalTok{      r\_true     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(log\_r\_true)}
\NormalTok{      q\_true     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(log\_q\_true)}

\NormalTok{      subject\_seed }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sample.int}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1e8}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      agent\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{simulate\_prototype\_agent\_scenario}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{agent\_id     =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}
        \AttributeTok{scenario     =}\NormalTok{ scenario,}
        \AttributeTok{r\_value      =}\NormalTok{ r\_true,}
        \AttributeTok{q\_value      =}\NormalTok{ q\_true,}
        \AttributeTok{subject\_seed =}\NormalTok{ subject\_seed}
\NormalTok{      )}

      \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{log\_r =}\NormalTok{ log\_r\_true, }\AttributeTok{log\_q =}\NormalTok{ log\_q\_true),}
        \AttributeTok{generated =} \FunctionTok{stan\_data\_from\_scenario\_agent}\NormalTok{(agent\_df)}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{run\_proto\_scenario\_sbc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scenario, }\AttributeTok{n\_sims =} \DecValTok{200}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  cache\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ch13\_proto\_sbc\_"}\NormalTok{, scenario, }\StringTok{".rds"}\NormalTok{))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(cache\_file)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Loaded cached prototype SBC for scenario:"}\NormalTok{, scenario, }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(cache\_file))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  gen }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_proto\_sbc\_generator}\NormalTok{(scenario)}
\NormalTok{  backend }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{SBC\_backend\_cmdstan\_sample}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    mod\_prototype\_single,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup   =} \DecValTok{800}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{chains        =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{adapt\_delta   =} \FloatTok{0.9}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh       =} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  datasets }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_datasets}\NormalTok{(gen, }\AttributeTok{n\_sims =}\NormalTok{ n\_sims)}
\NormalTok{  res }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_SBC}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    datasets,}
\NormalTok{    backend,}
    \AttributeTok{cache\_mode     =} \StringTok{"results"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{cache\_location =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ch13\_proto\_sbc\_cache\_"}\NormalTok{, scenario)),}
    \AttributeTok{keep\_fits      =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(res, cache\_file)}
\NormalTok{  res}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{proto\_sbc\_static }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{run\_proto\_scenario\_sbc}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"static"}\NormalTok{,           }\AttributeTok{n\_sims =} \DecValTok{200}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}

\NormalTok{proto\_sbc\_stats }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(scenario, variable) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{sbc\_mean\_bias =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(mean }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ simulated\_value, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{sbc\_rmse      =} \FunctionTok{sqrt}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{((mean }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ simulated\_value)}\SpecialCharTok{\^{}}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{sbc\_corr      =} \FunctionTok{cor}\NormalTok{(mean, simulated\_value,}
                        \AttributeTok{use =} \StringTok{"complete.obs"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{method =} \StringTok{"pearson"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{n\_sims        =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{n}\NormalTok{(),}
    \AttributeTok{.groups       =} \StringTok{"drop"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{n =} \ConstantTok{Inf}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 6 x 6
  scenario         variable sbc_mean_bias sbc_rmse sbc_corr n_sims
  <chr>            <chr>            <dbl>    <dbl>    <dbl>  <int>
1 contingent_shift log_q           0.0410    0.889    0.522    200
2 contingent_shift log_r          -0.0372    0.426    0.910    200
3 drift            log_q           0.0649    0.769    0.641    200
4 drift            log_r          -0.0276    0.453    0.893    200
5 static           log_q           0.118     0.828    0.529    200
6 static           log_r          -0.0262    0.411    0.917    200
\end{verbatim}

\textbf{Reading the three SBC results.} The static SBC for
\texttt{log\_q} shows the ECDF-difference curve drifting outside the
simultaneous band and the rank histogram humping --- posterior credible
intervals do not contain the truth at the nominal rate. The
contingent-shift SBC is noticeably better on \texttt{log\_q} but may
still show mild systematic deviation (a signature of the
smooth-drift-vs-abrupt-jump misspecification). The drift SBC should show
both parameters' curves squarely inside the band and rank histograms
close to uniform. This is the formal version of the identifiability
claim: calibration is achieved when task structure matches the model's
generative story.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{\texorpdfstring{Reparameterizing to Break the \(q\)/\(r\)
Ridge}{Reparameterizing to Break the q/r Ridge}}\label{reparameterizing-to-break-the-qr-ridge}

The static-scenario pair plot showed a heavy negatively-correlated ridge
on \texttt{(log\_r,\ log\_q)}. The ridge is \emph{geometric} --- a
property of the posterior shape, not of the information content. It
makes HMC sampling less efficient (ESS-per-draw falls as the posterior
elongates into a thin diagonal), makes SBC harder to interpret (the
failure mode could be either log\_r or log\_q but really it's their
difference), and obscures what the data actually say.

\subsection{The SNR Parameterisation}\label{the-snr-parameterisation}

Rewrite the two parameters as

\[\log r, \qquad \log \rho = \log q - \log r.\]

Here \(\rho = q/r\) is the drift-to-observation-noise ratio --- a
dimensionless scale that directly controls the Kalman filter's
steady-state gain. The original \texttt{log\_q} is now a \emph{derived}
quantity: \texttt{log\_q\ =\ log\_r\ +\ log\_rho}. If the data pin down
the \emph{sum} \(\log r + \log \rho\) (i.e.~\(\log q\)) cleanly but not
the \emph{difference} \(\log r - \log \rho\), the SNR parameterisation
represents this cleanly as a wide marginal on one of the two parameters
--- no diagonal ridge, no misleading pair plot.

We use Normal priors on both axes:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# SNR parameterisation priors.}
\CommentTok{\# log\_r \textasciitilde{} Normal(0, 1)      — same as the original parameterisation.}
\CommentTok{\# log\_rho \textasciitilde{} Normal({-}2, 1)   — centres rho at 0.135 (drift small vs. r).}
\CommentTok{\# Marginal on log\_q = log\_r + log\_rho is Normal({-}2, sqrt(2)) ≈ Normal({-}2, 1.41).}
\CommentTok{\# Slightly wider than the original Normal({-}2, 1), but the increase is modest and}
\CommentTok{\# the shape of the implied prior predictive is comparable.}
\NormalTok{LOG\_RHO\_PRIOR\_MEAN }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{2.0}
\NormalTok{LOG\_RHO\_PRIOR\_SD   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{1.0}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{The SNR Stan Model}\label{the-snr-stan-model}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{stan\_file\_proto\_snr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"stan"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch12\_prototype\_single\_snr.stan"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{mod\_prototype\_snr   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{cmdstan\_model}\NormalTok{(stan\_file\_proto\_snr)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

See \texttt{stan/ch12\_prototype\_single\_snr.stan}. The only
parameter-block change is \texttt{log\_rho} replacing \texttt{log\_q};
\texttt{log\_q} is computed in transformed parameters.

\subsection{Fitting Both Parameterisations to the Same Static
Data}\label{fitting-both-parameterisations-to-the-same-static-data}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{snr\_static\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simmodels"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_proto\_snr\_static\_fit.rds"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{static\_agent }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ scenario\_single\_fit\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{static  }\CommentTok{\# same dataset as above}
\NormalTok{snr\_static\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{ntrials            =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(static\_agent),}
  \AttributeTok{nfeatures          =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L,}
  \AttributeTok{cat\_one            =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(static\_agent}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{observed\_feedback),}
  \AttributeTok{y                  =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(static\_agent}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sim\_response),}
  \AttributeTok{obs                =} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(static\_agent[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)]),}
  \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat0    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat1    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{initial\_sigma\_diag =} \FloatTok{10.0}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{prior\_logr\_mean    =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
  \AttributeTok{prior\_logr\_sd      =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD,}
  \AttributeTok{prior\_logrho\_mean  =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_RHO\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
  \AttributeTok{prior\_logrho\_sd    =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_RHO\_PRIOR\_SD}
\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(snr\_static\_file)) \{}
\NormalTok{  pf\_snr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    mod\_prototype\_snr}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{pathfinder}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ snr\_static\_data, }\AttributeTok{num\_paths =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
                                 \AttributeTok{refresh =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{seed =} \DecValTok{777}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\ConstantTok{NULL}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  fit\_proto\_snr\_static }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mod\_prototype\_snr}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{sample}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{data            =}\NormalTok{ snr\_static\_data,}
    \AttributeTok{init            =} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(pf\_snr)) pf\_snr }\ControlFlowTok{else} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{seed            =} \DecValTok{777}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{chains          =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{parallel\_chains =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{availableCores}\NormalTok{()),}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup     =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling   =} \DecValTok{1500}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh         =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{adapt\_delta     =} \FloatTok{0.9}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  fit\_proto\_snr\_static}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{save\_object}\NormalTok{(snr\_static\_file)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  fit\_proto\_snr\_static }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(snr\_static\_file)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{orig\_static\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ scenario\_fits}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{static}

\FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"=== Original (log\_r, log\_q) parameterisation ===}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

                               \StringTok{"ess\_bulk"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ess\_tail"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
