\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 4 x 4
  variable ess_bulk ess_tail parameterisation
  <chr>       <dbl>    <dbl> <chr>           
1 log_r       2578.    2361. original        
2 log_q       2824.    3184. original        
3 log_r       1921.    2268. SNR             
4 log_rho     2154.    2462. SNR             
\end{verbatim}

\textbf{The expected pattern.} The original pair plot shows the heavy
negative ridge; the SNR pair plot shows a wide-but-roughly-circular
cloud on \texttt{(log\_r,\ log\_rho)}. ESS-per-iteration should improve
for both parameters under SNR, because HMC no longer has to traverse a
long thin diagonal. The posterior over \texttt{log\_q} (a derived
quantity under SNR) is \emph{identical in substance} --- the two models
imply the same likelihood --- but the Stan sampler reaches it more
efficiently.

\subsection{SBC for the SNR Model on Drift
Data}\label{sbc-for-the-snr-model-on-drift-data}

We rerun SBC on the drift scenario under the SNR parameterisation as the
ultimate test: \emph{assumption-matched data + decorrelated
parameterisation = cleanest possible calibration.}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{snr\_sbc\_drift\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_proto\_snr\_sbc\_drift.rds"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{make\_snr\_sbc\_generator }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scenario) \{}
  \FunctionTok{SBC\_generator\_function}\NormalTok{(}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
\NormalTok{      log\_r\_true   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN,   LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD)}
\NormalTok{      log\_rho\_true }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, LOG\_RHO\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_RHO\_PRIOR\_SD)}
\NormalTok{      log\_q\_true   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ log\_r\_true }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ log\_rho\_true}
\NormalTok{      r\_true       }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(log\_r\_true)}
\NormalTok{      q\_true       }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(log\_q\_true)}

\NormalTok{      agent\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{simulate\_prototype\_agent\_scenario}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{agent\_id     =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}
        \AttributeTok{scenario     =}\NormalTok{ scenario,}
        \AttributeTok{r\_value      =}\NormalTok{ r\_true,}
        \AttributeTok{q\_value      =}\NormalTok{ q\_true,}
        \AttributeTok{subject\_seed =} \FunctionTok{sample.int}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1e8}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      )}

      \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{log\_r =}\NormalTok{ log\_r\_true,}
                         \AttributeTok{log\_rho =}\NormalTok{ log\_rho\_true,}
                         \AttributeTok{log\_q =}\NormalTok{ log\_q\_true),}
        \AttributeTok{generated =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{ntrials            =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(agent\_df),}
          \AttributeTok{nfeatures          =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L,}
          \AttributeTok{cat\_one            =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(agent\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{observed\_feedback),}
          \AttributeTok{y                  =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(agent\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sim\_response),}
          \AttributeTok{obs                =} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(agent\_df[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)]),}
          \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat0    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
          \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat1    =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
          \AttributeTok{initial\_sigma\_diag =} \FloatTok{10.0}\NormalTok{,}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_logr\_mean    =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_logr\_sd      =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD,}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_logrho\_mean  =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_RHO\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
          \AttributeTok{prior\_logrho\_sd    =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_RHO\_PRIOR\_SD}
\NormalTok{        )}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(snr\_sbc\_drift\_file)) \{}
\NormalTok{  gen }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_snr\_sbc\_generator}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"drift"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  backend }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{SBC\_backend\_cmdstan\_sample}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    mod\_prototype\_snr,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup   =} \DecValTok{800}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{chains        =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{adapt\_delta   =} \FloatTok{0.9}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh       =} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  datasets }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_datasets}\NormalTok{(gen, }\AttributeTok{n\_sims =} \DecValTok{200}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  snr\_sbc\_drift }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_SBC}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    datasets, backend,}
    \AttributeTok{cache\_mode     =} \StringTok{"results"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{cache\_location =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_proto\_snr\_sbc\_cache\_drift"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{keep\_fits      =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(snr\_sbc\_drift, snr\_sbc\_drift\_file)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  snr\_sbc\_drift }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(snr\_sbc\_drift\_file)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{plot\_ecdf\_diff}\NormalTok{(snr\_sbc\_drift) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{ggtitle}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"SNR{-}parameterised SBC on drift data"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_snr_sbc_drift-1.pdf}
\end{center}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{plot\_rank\_hist}\NormalTok{(snr\_sbc\_drift))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_snr_sbc_drift-2.pdf}
\end{center}

Under this combination we expect all three curves (\texttt{log\_r},
\texttt{log\_rho}, and the derived \texttt{log\_q}) to stay inside the
simultaneous band with flat rank histograms. Reparameterisation alone
does not manufacture information: on static data, the SNR model will
still show the drift-related direction as a wide marginal (just on
\texttt{log\_rho} now, not on a diagonal ridge). It is the
\emph{combination} of assumption-matched task and decorrelated
parameterisation that closes the loop.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{\texorpdfstring{Discussion: When Does \(q\) Become
Identifiable?}{Discussion: When Does q Become Identifiable?}}\label{discussion-when-does-q-become-identifiable}

The six validation panels (three scenarios × two parameterisations) give
the cleanest summary of the identifiability argument.

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
  \textbf{Static + original.} The posterior sits on a heavy
  negatively-correlated ridge. SBC for \texttt{log\_q} fails; parameter
  recovery is diffuse. This is the problem the chapter opened with.
\item
  \textbf{Static + SNR.} The ridge disappears. The poorly-identified
  direction is now cleanly visible as a wide marginal on
  \texttt{log\_rho}. SBC still fails for the drift-related direction ---
  reparameterisation does not manufacture information.
\item
  \textbf{Contingent-shift + original.} Post-flip recovery dynamics load
  on \(q\) directly, so the ridge shrinks and SBC for \texttt{log\_q}
  passes (or nearly passes). Caveat: the filter's smooth-drift
  assumption is technically violated by abrupt jumps, so posterior
  predictive checks may reveal systematic underperformance right after
  each flip.
\item
  \textbf{Contingent-shift + SNR.} Similar to contingent-shift +
  original, but with tighter posterior marginals and better MCMC
  geometry.
\item
  \textbf{Smooth drift + original.} Assumption-matched generative story.
  The posterior is roughly circular and SBC passes for both parameters.
\item
  \textbf{Smooth drift + SNR.} The best-case scenario: decorrelated
  parameterisation + assumption-matched task. Both SBC ECDFs inside the
  band, both rank histograms uniform, MCMC geometry clean.
\end{itemize}

\textbf{Paralleling Chapter 11.} The GCM-with-decay analysis in Chapter
11 showed that the decay parameter \(\lambda\) becomes identifiable when
the task exercises forgetting --- whether through reversals or drift.
The mechanism there is general-purpose (``downweight old stuff''), so
reversals and drift work comparably well. The Kalman filter's \(q\) is
assumption-specific (it encodes a \emph{Gaussian} drift prior), so the
assumption-matched smooth-drift task gives the cleanest result;
reversals work but with a mild misspecification signature. Both chapters
make the same underlying point: \emph{identifiability is a joint
property of the model and the task, not of the model alone.}

\textbf{Implication for the multilevel analysis that follows.} The
multilevel prototype model below uses the static paradigm by default to
stay comparable with prior drafts of this chapter. Readers using this
model for research should consider re-running the multilevel analysis on
drift data when possible; the population-level \texttt{log\_q} posterior
that looked wide before is not a sign that multilevel inference failed
--- it was a sign that the task was not giving the model what it needed
to pin \(q\) down.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Multilevel Prototype Model: Population Inference Across
Subjects}\label{multilevel-prototype-model-population-inference-across-subjects}

Real experiments involve many participants, each bringing their own
observation-noise tolerance and drift rate. Some learners trust
individual examples heavily (low \(r\)); others discount them (high
\(r\)). Some learners have more stable category representations (low
\(q\)); others show faster adaptation (high \(q\)). The
\textbf{multilevel prototype model} captures this variation by placing
population distributions over both \texttt{log\_r} and \texttt{log\_q}
and partially pooling information across subjects.

The structure is the minimal multilevel extension of the two-parameter
single-subject model:

\[\text{pop\_log\_r\_mean} \sim \mathcal{N}(0, 1), \quad \text{pop\_log\_r\_sd} \sim \text{Exponential}(2)\]
\[z_{r,j} \sim \mathcal{N}(0, 1), \quad \log r_j = \text{pop\_log\_r\_mean} + z_{r,j} \cdot \text{pop\_log\_r\_sd}\]
\[\text{pop\_log\_q\_mean} \sim \mathcal{N}(-2, 1), \quad \text{pop\_log\_q\_sd} \sim \text{Exponential}(2)\]
\[z_{q,j} \sim \mathcal{N}(0, 1), \quad \log q_j = \text{pop\_log\_q\_mean} + z_{q,j} \cdot \text{pop\_log\_q\_sd}\]

The non-centred parameterisation (NCP) for the per-subject offsets
avoids the funnel geometry that centred parameterisations produce when
the population SD is small. With two per-subject parameters, the SBC
rank histograms (below) show six curves: two population means, two
population SDs, and two individual-level curves
(\texttt{subj\_log\_r{[}1{]}}, \texttt{subj\_log\_q{[}1{]}}).

\subsection{Multilevel Forward
Simulation}\label{multilevel-forward-simulation}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Simulate a full multilevel dataset from specified population parameters.}
\NormalTok{simulate\_multilevel\_prototype }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    n\_subjects,}
\NormalTok{    stimulus\_info,}
\NormalTok{    n\_blocks,}
\NormalTok{    base\_seed,}
\NormalTok{    pop\_log\_r\_mean,}
\NormalTok{    pop\_log\_r\_sd,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_sd   =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{) \{}

  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(base\_seed)}
\NormalTok{  z\_log\_r     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n\_subjects, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  subj\_log\_r  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_r\_mean }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_r\_sd }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ z\_log\_r}
\NormalTok{  subj\_r      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(subj\_log\_r)}

\NormalTok{  z\_log\_q     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n\_subjects, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  subj\_log\_q  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_q\_mean }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_q\_sd }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ z\_log\_q}
\NormalTok{  subj\_q      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(subj\_log\_q)}

\NormalTok{  true\_params }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{agent\_id   =} \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(n\_subjects),}
    \AttributeTok{log\_r\_true =}\NormalTok{ subj\_log\_r,}
    \AttributeTok{r\_true     =}\NormalTok{ subj\_r,}
    \AttributeTok{log\_q\_true =}\NormalTok{ subj\_log\_q,}
    \AttributeTok{q\_true     =}\NormalTok{ subj\_q}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  sim\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(n\_subjects), }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(j) \{}
\NormalTok{    sched }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_subject\_schedule}\NormalTok{(stimulus\_info, n\_blocks,}
                                   \AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ base\_seed }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{100} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ j)}
\NormalTok{    obs   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(sched[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)])}
\NormalTok{    res   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{prototype\_kalman}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{r\_value            =}\NormalTok{ subj\_r[j],}
      \AttributeTok{q\_value            =}\NormalTok{ subj\_q[j],}
      \AttributeTok{obs                =}\NormalTok{ obs,}
      \AttributeTok{cat\_one            =}\NormalTok{ sched}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback,}
      \AttributeTok{initial\_mu         =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)),}
      \AttributeTok{initial\_sigma\_diag =} \FloatTok{10.0}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{    sched }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
      \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{agent\_id     =}\NormalTok{ j,}
        \AttributeTok{sim\_response =}\NormalTok{ res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sim\_response,}
        \AttributeTok{correct      =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(category\_feedback }\SpecialCharTok{==}\NormalTok{ sim\_response)}
\NormalTok{      ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
      \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(agent\_id) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
      \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{performance =} \FunctionTok{cumsum}\NormalTok{(correct) }\SpecialCharTok{/} \FunctionTok{row\_number}\NormalTok{()) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
      \FunctionTok{ungroup}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  \})}

  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ sim\_data, }\AttributeTok{true\_params =}\NormalTok{ true\_params)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Population parameters for multilevel simulation}
\NormalTok{pop\_params\_ml\_proto }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean =} \FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1.0}\NormalTok{),   }\CommentTok{\# prior median r = 1.0}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd   =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{,        }\CommentTok{\# moderate between{-}subject heterogeneity}
  \AttributeTok{n\_subjects     =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{sim\_file\_ml\_proto    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_proto\_ml\_sim\_data.csv"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{true\_params\_file\_ml  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_proto\_ml\_true\_params.csv"}\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||}
    \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(sim\_file\_ml\_proto) }\SpecialCharTok{||}
    \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(true\_params\_file\_ml)) \{}

\NormalTok{  ml\_sim\_out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{simulate\_multilevel\_prototype}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{n\_subjects     =}\NormalTok{ pop\_params\_ml\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{n\_subjects,}
    \AttributeTok{stimulus\_info  =}\NormalTok{ stimulus\_info,}
    \AttributeTok{n\_blocks       =}\NormalTok{ n\_blocks,}
    \AttributeTok{base\_seed      =} \DecValTok{42}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean =}\NormalTok{ pop\_params\_ml\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd   =}\NormalTok{ pop\_params\_ml\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  multilevel\_proto\_data    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ml\_sim\_out}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data}
\NormalTok{  multilevel\_proto\_params  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ml\_sim\_out}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{true\_params}

  \FunctionTok{write\_csv}\NormalTok{(multilevel\_proto\_data,   sim\_file\_ml\_proto)}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv}\NormalTok{(multilevel\_proto\_params, true\_params\_file\_ml)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Multilevel prototype simulation complete. Results saved.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  multilevel\_proto\_data   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(sim\_file\_ml\_proto,   }\AttributeTok{show\_col\_types =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  multilevel\_proto\_params }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(true\_params\_file\_ml, }\AttributeTok{show\_col\_types =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Loaded existing multilevel prototype simulation results.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

  \FunctionTok{stat\_summary}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fun =}\NormalTok{ mean, }\AttributeTok{geom =} \StringTok{"line"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{group =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}

\subsection{Implementing the Multilevel Prototype Model in
Stan}\label{implementing-the-multilevel-prototype-model-in-stan}

The multilevel Stan model extends the single-subject architecture by:

\begin{enumerate}
\def\labelenumi{\arabic{enumi}.}
\tightlist
\item
  Adding population hyperparameters \texttt{pop\_log\_r\_mean},
  \texttt{pop\_log\_r\_sd}, \texttt{pop\_log\_q\_mean}, and
  \texttt{pop\_log\_q\_sd} to the \texttt{parameters} block.
\item
  Adding per-subject NCP offsets
  \texttt{z\_log\_r{[}j{]}\ \textasciitilde{}\ Normal(0,\ 1)} and
  \texttt{z\_log\_q{[}j{]}\ \textasciitilde{}\ Normal(0,\ 1)}.
\item
  Looping the Kalman filter (with prediction step) over subjects in
  \texttt{transformed\ parameters}, exactly as the GCM does in Chapter
  11.
\end{enumerate}

The resulting model has \(4 + 2J\) parameters (\(J\) is the number of
subjects) --- still relatively compact compared to exemplar models ---
which makes posterior geometry and SBC diagnostics particularly legible.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{prototype\_ml\_stan }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"}
\StringTok{// Kalman Filter Prototype Model — Multilevel (Non{-}Centred Parameterisation)}
\StringTok{//}
\StringTok{// New relative to the single{-}subject model:}
\StringTok{//   1. Population hyperparameters for log\_r AND log\_q.}
\StringTok{//   2. Per{-}subject NCP offsets z\_log\_r[j] and z\_log\_q[j] \textasciitilde{} Normal(0, 1).}
\StringTok{//   3. Subject{-}indexed Kalman filter loop with prediction step in transformed parameters.}
\StringTok{//   4. ALL prior hyperparameters passed through the data block.}

\StringTok{data \{}
\StringTok{  int\textless{}lower=1\textgreater{} N\_total;}
\StringTok{  int\textless{}lower=1\textgreater{} N\_subjects;}
\StringTok{  int\textless{}lower=1\textgreater{} N\_features;}

\StringTok{  array[N\_subjects] int\textless{}lower=1, upper=N\_total\textgreater{} subj\_start;}
\StringTok{  array[N\_subjects] int\textless{}lower=1, upper=N\_total\textgreater{} subj\_end;}

\StringTok{  array[N\_total] int\textless{}lower=0, upper=1\textgreater{} y;}
\StringTok{  array[N\_total] int\textless{}lower=0, upper=1\textgreater{} cat\_one;}
\StringTok{  array[N\_total, N\_features] real obs;}

\StringTok{  // Fixed structural values (same as single{-}subject; not inferred)}
\StringTok{  vector[N\_features] initial\_mu\_cat0;}
\StringTok{  vector[N\_features] initial\_mu\_cat1;}
\StringTok{  real\textless{}lower=0\textgreater{} initial\_sigma\_diag;}

\StringTok{  // Prior hyperparameters for r}
\StringTok{  real pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_mean;}
\StringTok{  real\textless{}lower=0\textgreater{} pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_sd;}
\StringTok{  real\textless{}lower=0\textgreater{} pop\_log\_r\_sd\_prior\_rate;}

\StringTok{  // Prior hyperparameters for q}
\StringTok{  real pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_mean;}
\StringTok{  real\textless{}lower=0\textgreater{} pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_sd;}
\StringTok{  real\textless{}lower=0\textgreater{} pop\_log\_q\_sd\_prior\_rate;}
\StringTok{\}}

\StringTok{parameters \{}
\StringTok{  real pop\_log\_r\_mean;}
\StringTok{  real\textless{}lower=0\textgreater{} pop\_log\_r\_sd;}
\StringTok{  vector[N\_subjects] z\_log\_r;}

\StringTok{  real pop\_log\_q\_mean;}
\StringTok{  real\textless{}lower=0\textgreater{} pop\_log\_q\_sd;}
\StringTok{  vector[N\_subjects] z\_log\_q;}
\StringTok{\}}

\StringTok{transformed parameters \{}
\StringTok{  vector[N\_subjects] subj\_log\_r;}
\StringTok{  vector\textless{}lower=0\textgreater{}[N\_subjects] subj\_r;}
\StringTok{  vector[N\_subjects] subj\_log\_q;}
\StringTok{  vector\textless{}lower=0\textgreater{}[N\_subjects] subj\_q;}
\StringTok{  vector\textless{}lower=1e{-}9, upper=1{-}1e{-}9\textgreater{}[N\_total] prob\_cat1;}

\StringTok{  for (j in 1:N\_subjects) \{}
\StringTok{    subj\_log\_r[j] = pop\_log\_r\_mean + z\_log\_r[j] * pop\_log\_r\_sd;}
\StringTok{    subj\_r[j]     = exp(subj\_log\_r[j]);}
\StringTok{    subj\_log\_q[j] = pop\_log\_q\_mean + z\_log\_q[j] * pop\_log\_q\_sd;}
\StringTok{    subj\_q[j]     = exp(subj\_log\_q[j]);}
\StringTok{  \}}

\StringTok{  \{}
\StringTok{    matrix[N\_features, N\_features] I\_mat =}
\StringTok{      diag\_matrix(rep\_vector(1.0, N\_features));}

\StringTok{    for (j in 1:N\_subjects) \{}
\StringTok{      vector[N\_features] mu\_cat0 = initial\_mu\_cat0;}
\StringTok{      vector[N\_features] mu\_cat1 = initial\_mu\_cat1;}
\StringTok{      matrix[N\_features, N\_features] sigma\_cat0 =}
\StringTok{        diag\_matrix(rep\_vector(initial\_sigma\_diag, N\_features));}
\StringTok{      matrix[N\_features, N\_features] sigma\_cat1 =}
\StringTok{        diag\_matrix(rep\_vector(initial\_sigma\_diag, N\_features));}
\StringTok{      matrix[N\_features, N\_features] r\_matrix =}
\StringTok{        diag\_matrix(rep\_vector(subj\_r[j], N\_features));}
\StringTok{      matrix[N\_features, N\_features] q\_matrix =}
\StringTok{        diag\_matrix(rep\_vector(subj\_q[j], N\_features));}

\StringTok{      for (i in subj\_start[j]:subj\_end[j]) \{}
\StringTok{        vector[N\_features] x = to\_vector(obs[i]);}

\StringTok{        // ── Prediction step: add process noise to both categories ──────────}
\StringTok{        sigma\_cat0 = sigma\_cat0 + q\_matrix;}
\StringTok{        sigma\_cat1 = sigma\_cat1 + q\_matrix;}

\StringTok{        // ── Decision ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────}
\StringTok{        matrix[N\_features, N\_features] cov0 = sigma\_cat0 + r\_matrix;}
\StringTok{        matrix[N\_features, N\_features] cov1 = sigma\_cat1 + r\_matrix;}
\StringTok{        real log\_p0 = multi\_normal\_lpdf(x | mu\_cat0, cov0);}
\StringTok{        real log\_p1 = multi\_normal\_lpdf(x | mu\_cat1, cov1);}
\StringTok{        real p\_i    = exp(log\_p1 {-} log\_sum\_exp(log\_p0, log\_p1));}
\StringTok{        prob\_cat1[i] = fmax(1e{-}9, fmin(1 {-} 1e{-}9, p\_i));}

\StringTok{        // ── Update ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────}
\StringTok{        if (cat\_one[i] == 1) \{}
\StringTok{          vector[N\_features] innov = x {-} mu\_cat1;}
\StringTok{          matrix[N\_features, N\_features] S  = sigma\_cat1 + r\_matrix;}
\StringTok{          matrix[N\_features, N\_features] K  = mdivide\_right\_spd(sigma\_cat1, S);}
\StringTok{          matrix[N\_features, N\_features] IK = I\_mat {-} K;}
\StringTok{          mu\_cat1    = mu\_cat1 + K * innov;}
\StringTok{          sigma\_cat1 = IK * sigma\_cat1 * IK\textquotesingle{} + K * r\_matrix * K\textquotesingle{};}
\StringTok{          sigma\_cat1 = 0.5 * (sigma\_cat1 + sigma\_cat1\textquotesingle{});}
\StringTok{        \} else \{}
\StringTok{          vector[N\_features] innov = x {-} mu\_cat0;}
\StringTok{          matrix[N\_features, N\_features] S  = sigma\_cat0 + r\_matrix;}
\StringTok{          matrix[N\_features, N\_features] K  = mdivide\_right\_spd(sigma\_cat0, S);}
\StringTok{          matrix[N\_features, N\_features] IK = I\_mat {-} K;}
\StringTok{          mu\_cat0    = mu\_cat0 + K * innov;}
\StringTok{          sigma\_cat0 = IK * sigma\_cat0 * IK\textquotesingle{} + K * r\_matrix * K\textquotesingle{};}
\StringTok{          sigma\_cat0 = 0.5 * (sigma\_cat0 + sigma\_cat0\textquotesingle{});}
\StringTok{        \}}
\StringTok{      \}}
\StringTok{    \}}
\StringTok{  \}}
\StringTok{\}}

\StringTok{model \{}
\StringTok{  target += normal\_lpdf(pop\_log\_r\_mean | pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_mean,}
\StringTok{                                         pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_sd);}
\StringTok{  target += exponential\_lpdf(pop\_log\_r\_sd | pop\_log\_r\_sd\_prior\_rate);}
\StringTok{  target += std\_normal\_lpdf(z\_log\_r);}

\StringTok{  target += normal\_lpdf(pop\_log\_q\_mean | pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_mean,}
\StringTok{                                         pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_sd);}
\StringTok{  target += exponential\_lpdf(pop\_log\_q\_sd | pop\_log\_q\_sd\_prior\_rate);}
\StringTok{  target += std\_normal\_lpdf(z\_log\_q);}

\StringTok{  target += bernoulli\_lpmf(y | prob\_cat1);}
\StringTok{\}}

\StringTok{generated quantities \{}
\StringTok{  vector[N\_total] log\_lik;}
\StringTok{  real lprior;}
\StringTok{  for (i in 1:N\_total)}
\StringTok{    log\_lik[i] = bernoulli\_lpmf(y[i] | prob\_cat1[i]);}
\StringTok{  lprior = normal\_lpdf(pop\_log\_r\_mean | pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_mean, pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_sd) +}
\StringTok{           exponential\_lpdf(pop\_log\_r\_sd | pop\_log\_r\_sd\_prior\_rate) +}
\StringTok{           std\_normal\_lpdf(z\_log\_r) +}
\StringTok{           normal\_lpdf(pop\_log\_q\_mean | pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_mean, pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_sd) +}
\StringTok{           exponential\_lpdf(pop\_log\_q\_sd | pop\_log\_q\_sd\_prior\_rate) +}
\StringTok{           std\_normal\_lpdf(z\_log\_q);}
\StringTok{\}}
\StringTok{"}

\NormalTok{stan\_file\_proto\_ml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"stan"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_prototype\_ml.stan"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_stan\_file}\NormalTok{(prototype\_ml\_stan, }\AttributeTok{dir =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"stan"}\NormalTok{),}
                \AttributeTok{basename =} \StringTok{"ch13\_prototype\_ml.stan"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] "/Users/au209589/Dropbox/Teaching/AdvancedCognitiveModeling23_book/stan/ch13_prototype_ml.stan"
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{mod\_prototype\_ml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{cmdstan\_model}\NormalTok{(stan\_file\_proto\_ml)}
\FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Multilevel prototype Stan model compiled successfully.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
Multilevel prototype Stan model compiled successfully.
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{Fitting the Multilevel Prototype
Model}\label{fitting-the-multilevel-prototype-model}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# ── Build the Stan data list ─────────────────────────────────────────────────}
\NormalTok{proto\_ml\_sorted }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ multilevel\_proto\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{subj\_id\_stan =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(agent\_id))) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(subj\_id\_stan, trial\_within\_subject)}

\NormalTok{proto\_subj\_bounds }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ proto\_ml\_sorted }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{row\_idx =} \FunctionTok{row\_number}\NormalTok{()) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(subj\_id\_stan) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{subj\_start =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(row\_idx),}
    \AttributeTok{subj\_end   =} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(row\_idx),}
    \AttributeTok{.groups    =} \StringTok{"drop"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(subj\_id\_stan)}

\CommentTok{\# Prior design note on pop\_log\_r\_sd:}
\CommentTok{\# pop\_log\_r\_mean \textasciitilde{} Normal(0, 1): same as single{-}subject prior on log\_r.}
\CommentTok{\# pop\_log\_r\_sd   \textasciitilde{} Exponential(2): rate=2 gives median ≈ 0.35 (SD on log scale).}
\CommentTok{\# Marginal SD of subj\_log\_r ≈ sqrt(1 + 0.5\^{}2) ≈ 1.12 at the 50th pctile}
\CommentTok{\# of the pop\_log\_r\_sd prior — consistent with the single{-}agent prior range.}
\NormalTok{proto\_ml\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{N\_total                      =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(proto\_ml\_sorted),}
  \AttributeTok{N\_subjects                   =} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(proto\_ml\_sorted}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{subj\_id\_stan),}
  \AttributeTok{N\_features                   =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L,}
  \AttributeTok{subj\_start                   =}\NormalTok{ proto\_subj\_bounds}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{subj\_start,}
  \AttributeTok{subj\_end                     =}\NormalTok{ proto\_subj\_bounds}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{subj\_end,}
  \AttributeTok{y                            =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(proto\_ml\_sorted}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sim\_response),}
  \AttributeTok{cat\_one                      =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(proto\_ml\_sorted}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback),}
  \AttributeTok{obs                          =} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(proto\_ml\_sorted[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)]),}
  \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat0              =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat1              =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{initial\_sigma\_diag           =} \FloatTok{10.0}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_mean    =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_sd      =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD,}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd\_prior\_rate      =} \FloatTok{2.0}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_mean    =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_sd      =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_SD,}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_sd\_prior\_rate      =} \FloatTok{2.0}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{fit\_filepath\_ml\_proto }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simmodels"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_prototype\_ml\_fit.rds"}\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(fit\_filepath\_ml\_proto)) \{}
\NormalTok{  pf\_ml\_proto }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    mod\_prototype\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{pathfinder}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{data      =}\NormalTok{ proto\_ml\_data,}
      \AttributeTok{seed      =} \DecValTok{42}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{num\_paths =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{refresh   =} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) \{}
      \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Pathfinder failed — falling back to default initialisation."}\NormalTok{)}
      \ConstantTok{NULL}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  fit\_proto\_ml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mod\_prototype\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{sample}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{data            =}\NormalTok{ proto\_ml\_data,}
    \AttributeTok{init            =}\NormalTok{ pf\_ml\_proto,}
    \AttributeTok{chains          =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{parallel\_chains =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{availableCores}\NormalTok{()),}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup     =} \DecValTok{1500}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling   =} \DecValTok{1500}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh         =} \DecValTok{200}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{adapt\_delta     =} \FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{max\_treedepth   =} \DecValTok{12}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  fit\_proto\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{save\_object}\NormalTok{(fit\_filepath\_ml\_proto)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Multilevel prototype model fitted and saved.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  fit\_proto\_ml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readRDS}\NormalTok{(fit\_filepath\_ml\_proto)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Loaded existing multilevel prototype fit.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
Loaded existing multilevel prototype fit.
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{Mandatory MCMC Diagnostic Battery
(Multilevel)}\label{mandatory-mcmc-diagnostic-battery-multilevel}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(fit\_proto\_ml)) \{}
\NormalTok{  pop\_vars\_ml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pop\_log\_r\_mean"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pop\_log\_r\_sd"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pop\_log\_q\_mean"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pop\_log\_q\_sd"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  diag\_tbl\_ml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{diagnostic\_summary\_table}\NormalTok{(fit\_proto\_ml, }\AttributeTok{params =}\NormalTok{ pop\_vars\_ml)}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(diag\_tbl\_ml)}

  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(diag\_tbl\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{n\_divergent }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{            diag\_tbl\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{max\_rhat    }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \FloatTok{1.01}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{            diag\_tbl\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{min\_ess\_bulk }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{400}\NormalTok{))) \{}
    \FunctionTok{warning}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Multilevel diagnostic battery has failures. "}\NormalTok{,}
            \StringTok{"Inspect mcmc\_pairs() and consider tightening adapt\_delta or "}\NormalTok{,}
            \StringTok{"increasing max\_treedepth before interpreting posteriors."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  bayesplot}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mcmc\_pairs}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    fit\_proto\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pop\_log\_r\_mean"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pop\_log\_r\_sd"}\NormalTok{,}
                         \StringTok{"pop\_log\_q\_mean"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pop\_log\_q\_sd"}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{diag\_fun     =} \StringTok{"dens"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{off\_diag\_fun =} \StringTok{"hex"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  pop\_summary }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit\_proto\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{variables =}\NormalTok{ pop\_vars\_ml)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"=== Population Parameter Summary ===}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(pop\_summary)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{True population parameters used for simulation:}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  pop\_log\_r\_mean:"}\NormalTok{, pop\_params\_ml\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean, }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  pop\_log\_r\_sd:  "}\NormalTok{, pop\_params\_ml\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd, }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\subsection{Population Prior-Posterior
Update}\label{population-prior-posterior-update}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(fit\_proto\_ml)) \{}
\NormalTok{  draws\_ml\_proto }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as\_draws\_df}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    fit\_proto\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{draws}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pop\_log\_r\_mean"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pop\_log\_r\_sd"}\NormalTok{,}
                                     \StringTok{"pop\_log\_q\_mean"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pop\_log\_q\_sd"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  n\_prior }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(draws\_ml\_proto)}
  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  prior\_ml\_proto }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean =} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n\_prior, LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD),}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd   =} \FunctionTok{rexp}\NormalTok{(n\_prior, }\FloatTok{2.0}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean =} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n\_prior, LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_SD),}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_sd   =} \FunctionTok{rexp}\NormalTok{(n\_prior, }\FloatTok{2.0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  plot\_param\_update }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(param\_name, prior\_vec, post\_vec,}
\NormalTok{                                true\_val, fill\_color) \{}
\NormalTok{    df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{value        =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(prior\_vec, post\_vec),}
      \AttributeTok{Distribution =} \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Prior"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Posterior"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{each =} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(prior\_vec))}
\NormalTok{    )}
    \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(df, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ value, }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ Distribution, }\AttributeTok{color =}\NormalTok{ Distribution)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{geom\_density}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{geom\_vline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xintercept =}\NormalTok{ true\_val, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"red"}\NormalTok{,}
                 \AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values  =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Prior"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"grey70"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Posterior"} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ fill\_color)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Prior"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Posterior"} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ fill\_color)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =}\NormalTok{ param\_name, }\AttributeTok{x =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Density"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{axis.text.y =} \FunctionTok{element\_blank}\NormalTok{(), }\AttributeTok{axis.ticks.y =} \FunctionTok{element\_blank}\NormalTok{())}
\NormalTok{  \}}

    \StringTok{"Population log(r) mean"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{    prior\_ml\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean,}
\NormalTok{    draws\_ml\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean,}
\NormalTok{    pop\_params\_ml\_proto}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean,}

\NormalTok{  )}

  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{((p\_logr\_mean }\SpecialCharTok{|}\NormalTok{ p\_logr\_sd) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (p\_logq\_mean }\SpecialCharTok{|}\NormalTok{ p\_logq\_sd))}

=== Population Parameter Prior-Posterior Updates ===

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_multilevel_posterior_viz-1.pdf}
\end{center}

\textbf{Reading the population posterior.} The red dashed lines mark the
true parameter values used to generate the data. Well-calibrated
inference should show the posterior clearly shifted from the prior and
centred near the true value. With 20 subjects each contributing 64
trials, the population mean is well-identified; the population SD
requires more subjects before its posterior narrows substantially (see
§``Multilevel SBC'' below for the coverage analysis).

\subsection{Cross-Scenario Population
Recovery}\label{cross-scenario-population-recovery}

Mirroring Chapter 11's three-population analysis, we simulate one
population per scenario and verify that the multilevel prototype model
recovers population parameters with the same scenario-dependence
observed at the single-subject level. The key prediction:
\texttt{pop\_log\_r\_mean} should be well-recovered in all three
scenarios (observation noise directly shapes every per-trial
likelihood); \texttt{pop\_log\_q\_mean} should be poorly recovered in
static data (no drift to track) and cleanly recovered in the
smooth-drift scenario (assumption-matched generative process).

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{simulate\_ml\_proto\_scenario }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    n\_subjects, stimulus\_info, n\_blocks, scenario, base\_seed,}
\NormalTok{    pop\_log\_r\_mean, pop\_log\_r\_sd,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_sd   =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{) \{}

  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(base\_seed)}
\NormalTok{  z\_log\_r    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n\_subjects, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  subj\_log\_r }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_r\_mean }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_r\_sd }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ z\_log\_r}
\NormalTok{  subj\_r     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(subj\_log\_r)}

\NormalTok{  z\_log\_q    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n\_subjects, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  subj\_log\_q }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_q\_mean }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_q\_sd }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ z\_log\_q}
\NormalTok{  subj\_q     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(subj\_log\_q)}

\NormalTok{  true\_params }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{agent\_id   =} \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(n\_subjects),}
    \AttributeTok{scenario   =}\NormalTok{ scenario,}
    \AttributeTok{log\_r\_true =}\NormalTok{ subj\_log\_r, }\AttributeTok{r\_true =}\NormalTok{ subj\_r,}
    \AttributeTok{log\_q\_true =}\NormalTok{ subj\_log\_q, }\AttributeTok{q\_true =}\NormalTok{ subj\_q}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  sim\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(n\_subjects), }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(j) \{}
    \FunctionTok{simulate\_prototype\_agent\_scenario}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{agent\_id     =}\NormalTok{ j, }\AttributeTok{scenario =}\NormalTok{ scenario,}
      \AttributeTok{r\_value      =}\NormalTok{ subj\_r[j], }\AttributeTok{q\_value =}\NormalTok{ subj\_q[j],}
      \AttributeTok{subject\_seed =}\NormalTok{ base\_seed }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{100} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ j}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  \})}

  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ sim\_data, }\AttributeTok{true\_params =}\NormalTok{ true\_params)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{n\_subjects\_ml\_scen }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{10}
\NormalTok{pop\_params\_ml\_scen }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean =} \FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{),    }\CommentTok{\# population median r = 1.5}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd   =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean =} \FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{),   }\CommentTok{\# population median q = 0.15}
  \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_sd   =} \FloatTok{0.5}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{ml\_proto\_scenarios }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"static"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"contingent\_shift"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"drift"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{ml\_proto\_scen\_files }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scen) }\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{data  =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ch13\_proto\_ml\_scen\_data\_"}\NormalTok{,  scen, }\StringTok{".csv"}\NormalTok{)),}
  \AttributeTok{truth =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ch13\_proto\_ml\_scen\_truth\_"}\NormalTok{, scen, }\StringTok{".csv"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios)}

\NormalTok{ml\_scen\_files\_exist }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{map}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scen\_files, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(.x}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data, .x}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{truth))))}
\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{ml\_scen\_files\_exist) \{}
\NormalTok{  ml\_proto\_scen\_sims }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scen) \{}
\NormalTok{    out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{simulate\_ml\_proto\_scenario}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{n\_subjects     =}\NormalTok{ n\_subjects\_ml\_scen,}
      \AttributeTok{stimulus\_info  =}\NormalTok{ stimulus\_info,}
      \AttributeTok{n\_blocks       =}\NormalTok{ n\_blocks,}
      \AttributeTok{scenario       =}\NormalTok{ scen,}
      \AttributeTok{base\_seed      =} \FunctionTok{match}\NormalTok{(scen, ml\_proto\_scenarios) }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{1000} \SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{77}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean =}\NormalTok{ pop\_params\_ml\_scen}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean,}
      \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd   =}\NormalTok{ pop\_params\_ml\_scen}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd,}
      \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean =}\NormalTok{ pop\_params\_ml\_scen}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean,}
      \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_sd   =}\NormalTok{ pop\_params\_ml\_scen}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_q\_sd}
\NormalTok{    )}
    \FunctionTok{write\_csv}\NormalTok{(out}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data,        ml\_proto\_scen\_files[[scen]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data)}
    \FunctionTok{write\_csv}\NormalTok{(out}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{true\_params, ml\_proto\_scen\_files[[scen]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{truth)}
\NormalTok{    out}
\NormalTok{  \}) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  ml\_proto\_scen\_sims }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scen) }\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{data        =} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scen\_files[[scen]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data,  }\AttributeTok{show\_col\_types =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{true\_params =} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scen\_files[[scen]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{truth, }\AttributeTok{show\_col\_types =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{ml\_proto\_scen\_all }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scen)}
\NormalTok{  ml\_proto\_scen\_sims[[scen]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{scenario =}\NormalTok{ scen)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{scenario =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(scenario, }\AttributeTok{levels =}\NormalTok{ ml\_proto\_scenarios,}
                           \AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Static"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Contingent shift"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Smooth drift"}\NormalTok{)))}

\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scen\_all,}
       \FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ trial\_within\_subject, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ performance, }\AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ agent\_id)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.25}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"grey40"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{stat\_summary}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fun =}\NormalTok{ mean, }\AttributeTok{geom =} \StringTok{"line"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{group =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
               \AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"\#009E73"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{1.4}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

  \FunctionTok{geom\_hline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{yintercept =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"grey50"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

                      \StringTok{" agents per scenario; grey = individuals, green = population mean"}\NormalTok{),}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{build\_ml\_proto\_stan\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(ml\_data) \{}
\NormalTok{  sorted }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ml\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{subj\_id\_stan =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(agent\_id))) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(subj\_id\_stan, trial\_within\_subject)}

\NormalTok{  bounds }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sorted }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{row\_idx =} \FunctionTok{row\_number}\NormalTok{()) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(subj\_id\_stan) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{subj\_start =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(row\_idx), }\AttributeTok{subj\_end =} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(row\_idx),}
              \AttributeTok{.groups =} \StringTok{"drop"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(subj\_id\_stan)}

  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{N\_total                   =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(sorted),}
    \AttributeTok{N\_subjects                =} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(sorted}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{subj\_id\_stan),}
    \AttributeTok{N\_features                =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L,}
    \AttributeTok{subj\_start                =}\NormalTok{ bounds}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{subj\_start,}
    \AttributeTok{subj\_end                  =}\NormalTok{ bounds}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{subj\_end,}
    \AttributeTok{y                         =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(sorted}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sim\_response),}
    \AttributeTok{cat\_one                   =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(sorted}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback),}
    \AttributeTok{obs                       =} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(sorted[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)]),}
    \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat0           =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat1           =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{initial\_sigma\_diag        =} \FloatTok{10.0}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_mean =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_sd   =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd\_prior\_rate   =} \FloatTok{2.0}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_mean =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_sd   =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_SD,}
    \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_sd\_prior\_rate   =} \FloatTok{2.0}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{ml\_proto\_scen\_fit\_files }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map\_chr}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scen)}
  \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simmodels"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ch13\_proto\_ml\_scen\_fit\_"}\NormalTok{, scen, }\StringTok{".rds"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scen\_fit\_files))) \{}
\NormalTok{  ml\_proto\_scen\_fits }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scen) \{}
    \FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Fitting multilevel prototype — scenario:"}\NormalTok{, scen, }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    dat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{build\_ml\_proto\_stan\_data}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scen\_sims[[scen]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data)}
\NormalTok{    fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mod\_prototype\_ml}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{sample}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{data            =}\NormalTok{ dat,}
      \AttributeTok{chains          =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{parallel\_chains =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{availableCores}\NormalTok{()),}
      \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup     =} \DecValTok{1500}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling   =} \DecValTok{1500}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{refresh         =} \DecValTok{200}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{adapt\_delta     =} \FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{max\_treedepth   =} \DecValTok{12}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{    fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{save\_object}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scen\_fit\_files[[scen]])}
\NormalTok{    fit}
\NormalTok{  \}) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  ml\_proto\_scen\_fits }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scen\_fit\_files, readRDS) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{pop\_vars\_scen }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pop\_log\_r\_mean"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pop\_log\_r\_sd"}\NormalTok{,}
                   \StringTok{"pop\_log\_q\_mean"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pop\_log\_q\_sd"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{true\_vals\_scen }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{variable =}\NormalTok{ pop\_vars\_scen,}
  \AttributeTok{true\_val =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    pop\_params\_ml\_scen}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean,}
\NormalTok{    pop\_params\_ml\_scen}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd,}
\NormalTok{    pop\_params\_ml\_scen}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean,}
\NormalTok{    pop\_params\_ml\_scen}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pop\_log\_q\_sd}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{ml\_proto\_scen\_recovery }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scenarios, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(scen) \{}
\NormalTok{  ml\_proto\_scen\_fits[[scen]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{variables =}\NormalTok{ pop\_vars\_scen) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(variable, mean, q5, q95) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{scenario =}\NormalTok{ scen)}
\NormalTok{\}) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(true\_vals\_scen, }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"variable"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{scenario =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(scenario, }\AttributeTok{levels =}\NormalTok{ ml\_proto\_scenarios,}
                           \AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Static"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Contingent shift"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Smooth drift"}\NormalTok{)))}

\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(ml\_proto\_scen\_recovery,}
       \FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ scenario, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ mean, }\AttributeTok{ymin =}\NormalTok{ q5, }\AttributeTok{ymax =}\NormalTok{ q95, }\AttributeTok{color =}\NormalTok{ scenario)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_pointrange}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_hline}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{yintercept =}\NormalTok{ true\_val), }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"red"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{variable, }\AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{"free\_y"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\#999999"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"\#E69F00"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"\#009E73"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"Multilevel Population Recovery Across Scenarios"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Points = posterior mean; bars = 90\% CI; red dashes = true generating values"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Posterior estimate"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"none"}\NormalTok{,}
        \AttributeTok{axis.text.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{angle =} \DecValTok{30}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hjust =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.8\linewidth,height=\textheight,keepaspectratio]{12-CategorizationModelsPrototypes_files/figure-pdf/ch13_ml_scenario_recovery-1.pdf}
\end{center}

\textbf{Cross-scenario population recovery.} \texttt{pop\_log\_r\_mean}
is well-recovered in all three scenarios: observation noise directly
shapes every per-trial likelihood, so the data always constrain \(r\) at
the population level. \texttt{pop\_log\_q\_mean} tells a different
story. On static data the 90\% CI is wide and centred near the prior
mean --- partial pooling across 10 subjects cannot manufacture
information that no individual trial provides. On contingent-shift data
the CI narrows as reversal dynamics provide a collective signal;
subjects with more reversals lend strength to those with fewer. On drift
data both population means are cleanly recovered, with the 90\% CI
sitting close to the true value --- the assumption-matched scenario
scales cleanly from the single-subject to the multilevel level.

\textbf{Comparison with Chapter 11.} The decay GCM's cross-scenario
multilevel analysis showed that \texttt{pop\_log\_lambda\_mean} was most
clearly recovered on \emph{contingent-shift} data. Here
\texttt{pop\_log\_q\_mean} is most clearly recovered on \emph{drift}
data. The contrast reflects the models' different generative stories:
the GCM's general-purpose decay kernel captures contingent shifts as
well as drift (forgetting is useful whenever old evidence is stale,
regardless of \emph{why} it became stale); the Kalman filter's
smooth-drift prior is most consistent with the scenario where prototypes
literally undergo Gaussian random-walk drift.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Multilevel SBC}\label{multilevel-sbc}

Multilevel SBC checks that the full posterior --- including both
population hyperparameters and individual-level parameters --- is
correctly calibrated across the entire joint prior. The prototype model
now has two per-subject parameters (\(\log r\) and \(\log q\)), giving
six ECDF-difference curves in the SBC output.

\textbf{What the key curves test:}

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
  \texttt{pop\_log\_r\_mean} / \texttt{pop\_log\_q\_mean} --- Are the
  population-mean estimators centred? A monotone drift indicates
  directional bias.
\item
  \texttt{pop\_log\_r\_sd} / \texttt{pop\_log\_q\_sd} --- Are the
  population-SD estimators well-calibrated? U-shaped rank histograms
  indicate the posterior is overconfident; humps indicate
  underconfidence. The NCP should prevent reverse-funnel issues.
\item
  \texttt{subj\_log\_r{[}1{]}} / \texttt{subj\_log\_q{[}1{]}} --- Do
  partial pooling and NCP produce valid individual-level credible
  intervals for both parameters?
\end{itemize}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{sbc\_ml\_proto\_filepath }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simdata"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ch13\_sbc\_proto\_ml\_results.rds"}\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (regenerate\_simulations }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(sbc\_ml\_proto\_filepath)) \{}
\NormalTok{  n\_sbc\_iterations\_ml\_proto }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{200}   \CommentTok{\# use \textgreater{}= 1000 for publication{-}quality SBC}
\NormalTok{  n\_subjects\_sbc\_proto      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{10}

\NormalTok{  proto\_ml\_sbc\_generator }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{SBC\_generator\_function}\NormalTok{(}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
\NormalTok{      pop\_log\_r\_mean }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD)}
\NormalTok{      pop\_log\_r\_sd   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rexp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      pop\_log\_q\_mean }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN, LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_SD)}
\NormalTok{      pop\_log\_q\_sd   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rexp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.0}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{      z\_log\_r    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n\_subjects\_sbc\_proto, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      subj\_log\_r }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_r\_mean }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_r\_sd }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ z\_log\_r}
\NormalTok{      subj\_r     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(subj\_log\_r)}

\NormalTok{      z\_log\_q    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n\_subjects\_sbc\_proto, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      subj\_log\_q }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_q\_mean }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_q\_sd }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ z\_log\_q}
\NormalTok{      subj\_q     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(subj\_log\_q)}

\NormalTok{      all\_dat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(n\_subjects\_sbc\_proto), }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(j) \{}
\NormalTok{        sched }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_subject\_schedule}\NormalTok{(stimulus\_info, n\_blocks,}
                                       \AttributeTok{seed =} \FunctionTok{sample.int}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1e8}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{        res   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{prototype\_kalman}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{r\_value            =}\NormalTok{ subj\_r[j],}
          \AttributeTok{q\_value            =}\NormalTok{ subj\_q[j],}
          \AttributeTok{obs                =} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(sched[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)]),}
          \AttributeTok{cat\_one            =}\NormalTok{ sched}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback,}
          \AttributeTok{initial\_mu         =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)),}
          \AttributeTok{initial\_sigma\_diag =} \FloatTok{10.0}
\NormalTok{        )}
\NormalTok{        sched }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{agent\_id =}\NormalTok{ j, }\AttributeTok{sim\_response =}\NormalTok{ res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sim\_response)}
\NormalTok{      \})}

\NormalTok{      sorted }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ all\_dat }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
        \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{subj\_id\_stan =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(agent\_id))) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
        \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(subj\_id\_stan, trial\_within\_subject)}

\NormalTok{      bounds }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sorted }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
        \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{row\_idx =} \FunctionTok{row\_number}\NormalTok{()) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
        \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(subj\_id\_stan) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
        \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{subj\_start =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(row\_idx), }\AttributeTok{subj\_end =} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(row\_idx),}
                  \AttributeTok{.groups =} \StringTok{"drop"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
        \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(subj\_id\_stan)}

      \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{variables =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean    =}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_r\_mean,}
          \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd      =}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_r\_sd,}
          \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{subj\_log\_r[1]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}   \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ subj\_log\_r[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],}
          \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean    =}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_q\_mean,}
          \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_sd      =}\NormalTok{ pop\_log\_q\_sd,}
          \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{subj\_log\_q[1]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}   \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ subj\_log\_q[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{        ),}
        \AttributeTok{generated =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{N\_total                   =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(sorted),}
          \AttributeTok{N\_subjects                =}\NormalTok{ n\_subjects\_sbc\_proto,}
          \AttributeTok{N\_features                =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L,}
          \AttributeTok{subj\_start                =}\NormalTok{ bounds}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{subj\_start,}
          \AttributeTok{subj\_end                  =}\NormalTok{ bounds}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{subj\_end,}
          \AttributeTok{y                         =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(sorted}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sim\_response),}
          \AttributeTok{cat\_one                   =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(sorted}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{category\_feedback),}
          \AttributeTok{obs                       =} \FunctionTok{as.matrix}\NormalTok{(sorted[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"height"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"position"}\NormalTok{)]),}
          \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat0           =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
          \AttributeTok{initial\_mu\_cat1           =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{2.5}\NormalTok{),}
          \AttributeTok{initial\_sigma\_diag        =} \FloatTok{10.0}\NormalTok{,}
          \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_mean =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
          \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_mean\_prior\_sd   =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_R\_PRIOR\_SD,}
          \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_r\_sd\_prior\_rate   =} \FloatTok{2.0}\NormalTok{,}
          \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_mean =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_MEAN,}
          \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_mean\_prior\_sd   =}\NormalTok{ LOG\_Q\_PRIOR\_SD,}
          \AttributeTok{pop\_log\_q\_sd\_prior\_rate   =} \FloatTok{2.0}
\NormalTok{        )}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  proto\_ml\_sbc\_backend }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{SBC\_backend\_cmdstan\_sample}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    mod\_prototype\_ml,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_warmup   =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{iter\_sampling =} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{chains        =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{adapt\_delta   =} \FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{refresh       =} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  proto\_ml\_datasets }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_datasets}\NormalTok{(}

\NormalTok{    proto\_ml\_datasets,}

\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(sbc\_results\_ml\_proto, sbc\_ml\_proto\_filepath)}

  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title    =} \StringTok{"Individual Parameter Recovery (Subject 1) Across SBC"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Posterior mean vs. true generated value"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"True value [Subject 1]"}\NormalTok{,}
